nodes.name: 1-Day Handling
nodes.desc: Seller commitment to ship within 1 business day of payment receipt, standard for high-volume sellers.

nodes.name: 1099-K Tax Form
nodes.desc: IRS tax document issued to US sellers with 200+ transactions OR $20K+ gross sales annually reporting payment card and third-party network transactions.

nodes.name: 2-Step Verification
nodes.desc: Alternative naming for Two-Factor Authentication emphasizing sequential verification steps in login flow.

nodes.name: 30-Day Returns
nodes.desc: Standard return window offering buyers 30 days from delivery to initiate a return.

nodes.name: 360 Spin
nodes.desc: Interactive product photography feature enabling 360-degree rotation view on desktop and mobile via multi-angle photo upload or app capture.

nodes.name: 60-Day Returns
nodes.desc: Extended return window offering buyers 60 days from delivery, providing competitive advantage and search boost.

nodes.name: Above Standard
nodes.desc: Mid-tier seller performance level in 3-tier system (Below/Above/Top Rated).

nodes.name: Above Standard
nodes.desc: Middle tier seller performance status indicating satisfactory metrics (defect rate <2-3% depending on market). No selling limits or search penalties. Majority of active sellers maintain this status. Below this is 'Below Standard', above is 'Top Rated Seller'.

nodes.name: Accept Offer
nodes.desc: Seller action to approve buyer's Best Offer, creating binding sale at offered price.

nodes.name: Accept Return
nodes.desc: Seller approval action providing buyer with prepaid return label and refund commitment upon item receipt.

nodes.name: Account Management Plus
nodes.desc: Mid-tier account management service for growing sellers.

nodes.name: Account Management Premium
nodes.desc: Premium account management with dedicated support team.

nodes.name: Account Security
nodes.desc: Multi-layered protection including password strength requirements, 2FA, login alerts, session management, and breach monitoring to prevent account takeovers.

nodes.name: Account Settings
nodes.desc: Cross-platform configuration hub for personal info, payment methods, shipping addresses, notification preferences, and privacy controls.

nodes.name: Account Suspended
nodes.desc: Critical alert blocking listing creation or bidding due to policy violation, unpaid seller fees, or security concern.

nodes.name: Account Suspension
nodes.desc: Temporary or permanent account restriction preventing buying, selling, or messaging due to serious policy violations, fraud, or legal orders. Appeal process available.

nodes.name: Active Content Policy
nodes.desc: Security policy blocking JavaScript, Flash, and interactive elements in listing descriptions to prevent phishing and ensure mobile compatibility.

nodes.name: Active Listings
nodes.desc: Seller Hub view showing all currently live listings available for buyers to purchase or bid on.

nodes.name: Ad Attribution
nodes.desc: Analytics showing which sales resulted from Promoted Listings ads versus organic search placement.

nodes.name: Ad Fee
nodes.desc: Commission charged when promoted listing generates sale, calculated as percentage of final sale price.

nodes.name: Ad Rate Recommendation
nodes.desc: Machine learning model suggesting optimal ad rate per listing based on category competition, margins, and conversion likelihood to maximize ROI.

nodes.name: Add Payment Method
nodes.desc: Wallet management action to securely store credit card, debit card, or bank account for faster future checkouts.

nodes.name: Add to Cart
nodes.desc: Shopping cart functionality allowing buyers to purchase multiple items from one or more sellers in a single checkout.

nodes.name: Add to Watch List
nodes.desc: Cross-platform buyer action saving listing to personalized Watch List for price monitoring, auction tracking, and purchase consideration with notification support.

nodes.name: Add to Watchlist
nodes.desc: One-click action to save item for later, triggering price drop alerts, ending soon notifications, and recommendation signals. 400M+ items watched daily.

nodes.name: Advanced Listing Tool
nodes.desc: Full-featured listing editor with all customization options.

nodes.name: Advanced Listing Tool
nodes.desc: Full-featured listing editor with all options exposed. Localized: DE 'Erweiterten Einstelltools' (extended setup tools), IT 'Strumento di vendita avanzato' (advanced sales tool). Includes scheduling, variations, HTML description editing, and catalog integration.

nodes.name: Advanced Search
nodes.desc: Enhanced search interface with filters for price range, condition, location, listing format, and more.

nodes.name: AI Banner
nodes.desc: AI-generated store banners with automated design and branding.

nodes.name: AI Snap
nodes.desc: Mobile camera feature enabling instant product recognition and catalog matching by photographing items, powered by computer vision and eBay Product Catalog integration.

nodes.name: Anniversary Sale
nodes.desc: September celebration of eBay founding (Sept 1995) with nostalgia marketing, retro collectibles spotlight, exclusive discounts, user milestone rewards.

nodes.name: Antiques
nodes.desc: Category for items 100+ years old including furniture, pottery, glassware, art, textiles with provenance documentation and appraisal support.

nodes.name: App Store Promotion
nodes.desc: eBay-funded acquisition campaigns on Apple App Store, Google Play featuring discounts for new app users. $5-10 off first purchase via app.

nodes.name: Apple Pay
nodes.desc: Digital wallet payment option for iOS users completing checkout via Apple Pay.

nodes.name: Ask Question
nodes.desc: Public Q&A post button creating visible listing thread where seller response appears for all prospective buyers.

nodes.name: Ask Seller a Question
nodes.desc: Pre-purchase messaging tool on item pages allowing buyers to inquire about condition, shipping, compatibility. Sellers encouraged to respond within 24 hours for trust signal.

nodes.name: Assured Fit
nodes.desc: UK equivalent of eBay Guaranteed Fit, providing compatibility assurance and free returns for automotive parts that don't match vehicle specifications.

nodes.name: Aste di beneficenza
nodes.desc: Italy-specific charity auction program operating independently from eBay for Charity, with distinct nonprofit partnerships and donation mechanics.

nodes.name: Auction Ended
nodes.desc: Status indicator showing an auction has concluded, displaying winning bid and winner information.

nodes.name: Auction Format
nodes.desc: Classic eBay listing format where buyers bid against each other, with item selling to highest bidder at listing end.

nodes.name: Auction-Style Listings
nodes.desc: Time-limited auction format where buyers place competitive bids.

nodes.name: Auction-Style Listings
nodes.desc: Time-based bidding format (eBay's original model). Usage varies dramatically by market: US 15% of listings, UK 25%, DE 35%, IT 40%. Terminology: UK 'Selling through auctions', DE 'Artikel über Auktionen verkaufen' (sell articles via auctions), FR 'Vendre au format Enchères' (sell in auction format).

nodes.name: Audience Targeting
nodes.desc: Promoted Listings Advanced feature using first-party data (browsing, purchase history, cart abandonment) to target high-intent buyer segments.

nodes.name: Augmented Reality Preview
nodes.desc: iOS app feature using ARKit to visualize furniture, decor items in buyer's space via camera before purchase. Available in Home & Garden categories.

nodes.name: Australia Post Express
nodes.desc: Premium Australian shipping with 1-2 day metro delivery, tracking, insurance. eBay label discounts up to 25% off retail rates.

nodes.name: Authenticator App
nodes.desc: TOTP-based 2FA method using Google Authenticator, Authy, or Microsoft Authenticator generating time-sensitive codes without SMS dependency.

nodes.name: Authenticity Guarantee
nodes.desc: Third-party authentication service verifying luxury items like watches, sneakers, handbags, jewelry, and trading cards before delivery.

nodes.name: Authenticity Guarantee Filter
nodes.desc: Search refinement showing only luxury items eligible for third-party authentication inspection before delivery. Available in Handbags, Watches, Sneakers, Jewelry, Trading Cards.

nodes.name: Authenticity Guarantee - Handbags
nodes.desc: Authentication for luxury handbags in US, UK, DE, AU and limited EU markets.

nodes.name: Authenticity Guarantee - Jewelry
nodes.desc: GIA partnership for jewelry authentication available in US and UK only.

nodes.name: Authenticity Guarantee
nodes.desc: Third-party authentication for luxury goods (watches, sneakers, handbags). Launched US 2020, UK 2021, DE 2022. Authentication partners vary by market: US uses multiple vendors, UK primarily uses Entrupy, DE partners with TÜV. Translation: DE 'eBay-Authentifizierungsgarantie', FR 'Garantie d'authenticité', IT 'Garanzia di autenticità'.

nodes.name: Authenticity Guarantee - Sneakers
nodes.desc: Authentication service for sneakers available across all 7 markets.

nodes.name: Authenticity Guarantee - Streetwear
nodes.desc: Authentication for streetwear and apparel available in US, UK, and DE.

nodes.name: Authenticity Guarantee - Trading Cards
nodes.desc: PSA partnership for trading card authentication available in US and CA only.

nodes.name: Authenticity Guarantee - Watches
nodes.desc: Third-party authentication for luxury watches available in US, UK, DE and limited EU markets.

nodes.name: Authorized Seller Filter
nodes.desc: Search refinement showing only sellers officially authorized by brand manufacturers to sell new products, providing warranty coverage and authenticity assurance.

nodes.name: Auto Pay
nodes.desc: Setting to automatically charge saved payment method immediately after Buy It Now or winning auction bid, eliminating manual checkout step.

nodes.name: Auto Pricing
nodes.desc: Automated pricing rules that adjust listing prices based on competitor pricing, market conditions, or sales velocity.

nodes.name: Auto-Relist
nodes.desc: Automated republishing feature continuously relisting unsold items until sold, with optional price reduction on each cycle.

nodes.name: Automatic Bidding
nodes.desc: Proxy bidding system where eBay automatically increases a buyer's bid up to their maximum amount when outbid.

nodes.name: Automatic Relisting
nodes.desc: Automated relisting of unsold items until sold or limit reached.

nodes.name: Awaiting Shipment
nodes.desc: Seller Hub view showing orders requiring tracking upload or mark-as-shipped action. Color-coded by handling time deadline (green: on time, red: overdue).

nodes.name: Back in Stock
nodes.desc: Restock notification sent when previously sold-out listing becomes available again with renewed inventory from seller.

nodes.name: Back to School
nodes.desc: August-September promotional event for student essentials (laptops, backpacks, dorm, supplies) with education discounts, tax-free promotions in participating states.

nodes.name: Background Enhancement
nodes.desc: AI-powered automatic background removal and enhancement for listing photos.

nodes.name: Barcode Scanner
nodes.desc: Mobile device camera-based scanner reading UPC/EAN/ISBN barcodes to instantly retrieve product catalog data, pricing suggestions, and auto-populate listing fields.

nodes.name: Below Standard
nodes.desc: Low-tier seller performance level subject to restrictions and search penalties.

nodes.name: Below Standard
nodes.desc: Lowest seller performance tier triggered by excessive defects (>3-5%), late shipments, or policy violations. Results in selling limits, search suppression, removal of Top Rated status, and potential account restrictions. Requires improvement plan. Can escalate to selling suspension.

nodes.name: Best Match
nodes.desc: Default search ranking algorithm balancing relevance, seller quality, and buyer preferences.

nodes.name: Best Match (Cassini)
nodes.desc: Default search ranking algorithm (Cassini) with market-specific tuning. US emphasizes conversion rate and seller performance, UK/DE weight delivery speed higher, FR/IT prioritize price competitiveness. Translation: DE 'Beste Ergebnisse' (best results), FR 'Pertinence' (relevance), IT 'Rilevanza' (relevance).

nodes.name: Best Match Sort
nodes.desc: Default search ranking algorithm combining relevance, seller quality, price competitiveness, shipping speed, listing quality, and conversion signals.

nodes.name: Best Offer
nodes.desc: Negotiation feature for buyers to submit offers on Buy It Now listings.

nodes.name: Best Offer
nodes.desc: Seller's perspective of Make Offer feature. Inbox in Seller Hub showing incoming offers with accept/decline/counter options. Auto-accept and auto-decline thresholds configurable. Translation differences minimal - most markets use 'Best Offer'.

nodes.name: Bid Increment
nodes.desc: Minimum amount by which next bid must exceed current high bid, scales based on current price level.

nodes.name: Bid Now
nodes.desc: Primary action button for entering a bid on an auction-style listing.

nodes.name: Bid Shielding Policy
nodes.desc: Prohibition against colluding bidders placing high bids to discourage others, then retracting before auction end. Enforced via bidding behavior analysis.

nodes.name: Bidding
nodes.desc: My eBay section showing active bids, bidding history, current high bid status, and auction end times with mobile notification support.

nodes.name: Bids & Offers
nodes.desc: Mobile app tab consolidating active bids, submitted offers, and auction watch list with real-time status updates and quick-action buttons.

nodes.name: Biometric Verification
nodes.desc: Face ID, Touch ID, or fingerprint authentication for mobile app login and payment confirmation with device-level security integration.

nodes.name: Black Friday Deals
nodes.desc: Annual November event with 70%+ off discounts, doorbusters rotating hourly, exclusive seller participation requiring 4.8+ rating and 30-day returns.

nodes.name: Block Buyer List
nodes.desc: Seller control allowing up to 5,000 buyer usernames to be blocked from purchasing. Prevents problem buyers, competitors, or abusive actors from transacting.

nodes.name: Block Buyers
nodes.desc: Tool allowing sellers to manually block specific eBay members from bidding on or purchasing their items.

nodes.name: Bold
nodes.desc: Paid listing enhancement making title bold in search results. Largely deprecated.

nodes.name: Bold Title
nodes.desc: Paid upgrade making listing title bold in search results.

nodes.name: Bons Plans
nodes.desc: France-exclusive deals and promotions program for curated offers.

nodes.name: Bons Plans
nodes.desc: France-exclusive deals program. 'Bons Plans' translates to 'good deals' or 'hot tips'. Features curated promotions across categories with French buyer preferences (high-end fashion, premium electronics, automotive). Separate section on eBay.fr homepage.

nodes.name: Boost Buyer Engagement
nodes.desc: Marketing tools and recommendations for increasing buyer interaction.

nodes.name: Bounce Rate
nodes.desc: Percentage of visitors who leave listing immediately without interaction, indicating relevance or quality issues.

nodes.name: Brand-Funded Promoted Listings Priority
nodes.desc: Co-funded advertising where brands pay for seller promotions in premium placements.

nodes.name: Brand-Funded Promoted Stores
nodes.desc: Brand-funded store-level promotions for authorized sellers and partners.

nodes.name: Brand Identity
nodes.desc: Seller branding capabilities within eBay Stores and listings, including logos, colors, and custom headers.

nodes.name: Brand Name
nodes.desc: Listing field for specifying the manufacturer or brand name of a product, required for many categories.

nodes.name: Brand Outlet
nodes.desc: Dedicated storefront for authorized brand clearance and overstock.

nodes.name: Browse Categories
nodes.desc: Hierarchical navigation system with 1000+ product categories organized by vertical (Motors, Fashion, Electronics, Collectibles, etc.) for exploratory shopping.

nodes.name: Bulk Edit
nodes.desc: Desktop feature enabling simultaneous price, quantity, shipping, or description updates across multiple selected listings with preview and rollback.

nodes.name: Bulk Listing
nodes.desc: Desktop-based multi-listing creation workflow supporting CSV import, API integration, and file-based upload for sellers with 50+ active listings.

nodes.name: Bulk Listing Tool
nodes.desc: Tool for creating or editing multiple listings simultaneously.

nodes.name: Bulk Listing Tool
nodes.desc: CSV/Excel upload for creating multiple listings simultaneously. Supports 1-5000 listings per upload. Localized templates by market with market-specific required fields (GTIN in US, EAN in EU). Translation: DE 'Massenangebots-Tool', FR 'Outil de mise en vente en masse', IT 'Strumento di inserzione multipla'.

nodes.name: Bulk Listing Tools
nodes.desc: Desktop suite of high-volume seller features including CSV upload, bulk edit, scheduled listings, and template-based creation for 100+ listing workflows.

nodes.name: Bulk Listing Upload
nodes.desc: CSV/Excel upload tool for creating 100+ listings simultaneously via File Exchange. Requires Business Policies setup. Used by 60% of high-volume sellers.

nodes.name: Bulk Upload
nodes.desc: Suite of tools for creating, editing, or ending multiple listings simultaneously via file upload or API.

nodes.name: Business Equipment Purchase Protection
nodes.desc: Buyer protection tailored for commercial equipment purchases with enhanced coverage limits.

nodes.name: Business Policies
nodes.desc: Reusable templates for payment, shipping, and return policies.

nodes.name: Buy Again
nodes.desc: Quick repurchase feature allowing buyers to rebuy previously purchased items from purchase history.

nodes.name: Buy It Now
nodes.desc: Fixed-price listing format allowing immediate purchase without auction bidding.

nodes.name: Buy It Now Filter
nodes.desc: Search refinement to show only fixed-price or auction-with-BIN listings, excluding pure auction format for instant purchase preference.

nodes.name: Buy It Now in Auctions
nodes.desc: Option in auction listings allowing buyers to purchase immediately at a fixed price before bidding reaches a threshold.

nodes.name: Buy It Now
nodes.desc: Fixed-price purchase option (vs auction bidding). Launched 2000, now dominant format (85% of listings globally). Localized: DE 'Sofort-Kaufen' (buy immediately), FR 'Achat immédiat' (immediate purchase), IT 'Compralo Subito' (buy it immediately). Critical for mobile commerce.

nodes.name: Buy It Now Price
nodes.desc: Fixed price option on auction listings allowing immediate purchase without bidding.

nodes.name: Buyer Groups
nodes.desc: Segmentation tool for targeting promotions to specific buyer cohorts.

nodes.name: Buyer Messages
nodes.desc: Seller Hub inbox for buyer questions about listings, shipping, returns. Response time tracked in seller performance (24hr response recommended). Integrated with mobile app.

nodes.name: Buyer Pays Return Shipping
nodes.desc: Return policy option where buyer covers cost of return shipping unless item not as described.

nodes.name: Buyer Protection
nodes.desc: Umbrella term for buyer safety programs including Money Back Guarantee and purchase protections.

nodes.name: Buyer Requirements
nodes.desc: Seller tool to set automatic restrictions on who can bid or buy, filtering buyers by feedback score, location, or payment method.

nodes.name: Buyer Review
nodes.desc: Individual review submission by a buyer for a purchased item, including star rating and written feedback.

nodes.name: Buying Format
nodes.desc: Listing type filter separating Buy It Now fixed-price, Auction, Best Offer, and classified ad format results.

nodes.name: Buying Restrictions
nodes.desc: Account limitations on buyers with unpaid items, return abuse, or fraudulent activity. Caps monthly purchase limits, restricts high-value transactions, requires verified payment.

nodes.name: Calculated Shipping
nodes.desc: Dynamic shipping cost calculator using buyer location, package dimensions, and carrier rates to determine exact shipping fees.

nodes.name: Campaign Bidding
nodes.desc: Promoted Listings Advanced feature allowing sellers to set max CPC bids per keyword or audience segment for budget control and ROAS optimization.

nodes.name: Canada Post Expedited
nodes.desc: Canadian mid-tier shipping with 2-5 day delivery, tracking, insurance. Discounted rates via eBay for cross-country shipments.

nodes.name: Cancel Order
nodes.desc: Process for seller or buyer to void transaction before shipment, requires mutual agreement or valid reason.

nodes.name: Cancellation Request
nodes.desc: Buyer-initiated request to cancel order after purchase but before shipment, requires seller approval.

nodes.name: Cart Total
nodes.desc: Real-time price calculation showing item subtotal, shipping, tax, and discounts with mobile-sticky footer display during checkout.

nodes.name: Cases Closed Without Seller Resolution
nodes.desc: Metric tracking cases where eBay stepped in to resolve dispute, counting as defect against seller.

nodes.name: Cassini
nodes.desc: eBay's proprietary search engine algorithm determining listing relevance and ranking in search results.

nodes.name: Category Browse
nodes.desc: Hierarchical navigation system allowing buyers to explore items by product category and subcategory.

nodes.name: CBT Seller Dashboard
nodes.desc: Cross-border trade dashboard for international sellers managing multi-market operations.

nodes.name: CCPA Compliance
nodes.desc: California Consumer Privacy Act compliance allowing CA residents to opt out of data sale, request deletion, access collected data. 'Do Not Sell My Info' link in footer.

nodes.name: Certificate of Authenticity
nodes.desc: Third-party authentication documentation (PSA/DNA, JSA, Beckett) required for autographed sports memorabilia $250+ to combat forgeries.

nodes.name: Certified by Brand
nodes.desc: US luxury program where brands certify authenticity of their own products. Launched April 2023.

nodes.name: Certified Open Box
nodes.desc: Brand-new items in opened packaging with full warranty and return protection. Launched May 2025.

nodes.name: Certified Recycled
nodes.desc: Badge for items made from certified recycled materials.

nodes.name: Certified Recycled Program
nodes.desc: Certification for recycled electronics and sustainable products.

nodes.name: Certified Recycler Program
nodes.desc: Certification for sellers specializing in recycled and refurbished electronics.

nodes.name: Certified Refurbished
nodes.desc: Top-tier eBay Refurbished condition with manufacturer certification and comprehensive warranty.

nodes.name: Checkout
nodes.desc: Streamlined payment and purchase flow integrated with eBay's Managed Payments system.

nodes.name: Checkout as Guest
nodes.desc: One-time purchase option allowing non-registered users to complete transaction without creating eBay account.

nodes.name: Circular Fashion Fund
nodes.desc: Funding initiative for sustainable fashion and circular economy projects. Active in US, UK, DE, AU; expanding to FR, IT, CA in 2026.

nodes.name: Classified Ads
nodes.desc: Local-only listing format for vehicles, real estate, heavy equipment. No auction/BIN, seller shows phone number, buyers contact directly. $40-125 insertion fee.

nodes.name: Clear Filters
nodes.desc: Reset button removing all active search refinements to return to unfiltered results view.

nodes.name: Click & Collect
nodes.desc: Buy online, pick up at designated collection points or retail locations.

nodes.name: Click & Collect
nodes.desc: Buy online, collect in-person option available in UK/DE/FR/IT/AU. Partners with Collect+ (UK), Hermes (DE), Mondial Relay (FR), SDA (IT). Buyers select collection point at checkout. Popular in Europe (30-40% adoption in some categories), less common in US where in-store pickup dominates.

nodes.name: Click & Collect
nodes.desc: Retail pickup service at designated collection points.

nodes.name: Click-Through Rate
nodes.desc: Percentage of impressions that result in clicks, measuring listing thumbnail and title effectiveness.

nodes.name: Coded Coupons
nodes.desc: Unique coupon codes for targeted promotions and tracking.

nodes.name: Coded Coupons
nodes.desc: Alphanumeric coupon codes buyers enter at checkout. Localized: DE 'Gutscheincodes' (voucher codes), FR 'Bons de réduction avec code' (reduction vouchers with code), IT 'Codici sconto' (discount codes). Supports single-use, limited quantity, and expiration settings.

nodes.name: Codeless Coupons
nodes.desc: Coupons automatically applied at checkout without code entry.

nodes.name: Coins & Currency
nodes.desc: Numismatics category for rare coins, paper money, bullion with grading standards (NGC, PCGS), precious metal spot pricing integration.

nodes.name: Collectibles Price Guide
nodes.desc: US market research tool providing historical pricing data and market trends for trading cards and collectibles.

nodes.name: Collection Points (AU)
nodes.desc: Australia Post parcel locker and post office collection network. 5,000+ locations. Integrated with eBay shipping labels. Popular for high-value items and apartment dwellers. Secure lockers with 48-hour collection window.

nodes.name: Collections
nodes.desc: Buyer-created curated lists for organizing saved items by theme, project, or category.

nodes.name: Combined Checkout
nodes.desc: Multi-item cart checkout enabling buyers to pay for multiple purchases from same seller simultaneously with combined shipping calculation.

nodes.name: Combined Shipping
nodes.desc: Discounted shipping when buyer purchases multiple items from same seller, consolidated into single package.

nodes.name: Combined Shipping Discount
nodes.desc: Seller-configured discount applying reduced shipping cost when buyer purchases multiple items. Rules: flat rate, percentage off, or free shipping after N items.

nodes.name: Comics
nodes.desc: Comic book category with CGC/CBCS grading integration, key issue pricing, variant tracking, and Golden/Silver/Bronze Age designations.

nodes.name: Communication Preferences
nodes.desc: Broader account settings covering notification delivery, marketing opt-ins, member-to-member messaging preferences, and newsletter subscriptions.

nodes.name: Community Forums
nodes.desc: Peer-to-peer discussion boards organized by topic (Shipping, Selling, eBay Stores, Motors) where 2M+ members share advice. Volunteer Power Sellers moderate.

nodes.name: Competitive Pricing
nodes.desc: Real-time pricing intelligence showing how seller's prices compare to similar active and sold listings.

nodes.name: Completed Listings
nodes.desc: All finished transactions including sold items and ended unsold listings, used for historical analysis.

nodes.name: Condition Description
nodes.desc: Detailed text description of item condition, supplementing the standard condition dropdown selection.

nodes.name: Condition Filter
nodes.desc: Product state checkboxes for New, Open Box, Certified Refurbished, Seller Refurbished, and Used item condition categories.

nodes.name: Condition: New Sort
nodes.desc: Sort option prioritizing brand new items over used/refurbished, surfacing factory-sealed products and retail stock first.

nodes.name: Console venditori
nodes.desc: Italian localization of Seller Hub. Includes Poste Italiane integration, Italian VAT (IVA) calculation, and compliance with Italian e-commerce regulations. Translation adapts business terminology to Italian commercial language norms.

nodes.name: Consommation Raisonnée
nodes.desc: France-specific responsible consumption initiative promoting sustainable buying.

nodes.name: Contact Seller
nodes.desc: Pre-purchase inquiry button opening message composer for questions about condition, compatibility, shipping, or bulk discounts.

nodes.name: Conversion Rate
nodes.desc: Percentage of listing views resulting in sales, key metric for listing optimization and pricing strategy.

nodes.name: Copy to Inventory
nodes.desc: Template save action storing listing details in Seller Hub inventory for reuse across multiple marketplace listings.

nodes.name: Copyright
nodes.desc: Legal protection mechanism for copyrighted content, enforced through VeRO program and reporting tools.

nodes.name: Cost Per Click
nodes.desc: Ad rate metric in Promoted Listings Advanced where sellers pay for each click on promoted listing.

nodes.name: Cost Per Sale
nodes.desc: Advertising metric showing total ad fees divided by number of attributed sales.

nodes.name: Counter Offer
nodes.desc: Seller response to buyer offer proposing alternative price, part of Best Offer negotiation workflow.

nodes.name: Counterfeit Detection
nodes.desc: Machine learning system scanning listings for counterfeit signals (keywords, pricing, seller history) and blocking before publication. 95% accuracy, blocks 1M+ listings annually.

nodes.name: Counteroffer
nodes.desc: Seller response to buyer's Best Offer proposing a different price for negotiation.

nodes.name: Coupons
nodes.desc: Digital coupons for percentage or fixed-amount discounts.

nodes.name: Credit Card
nodes.desc: Direct credit card payment processing through eBay Managed Payments (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover).

nodes.name: Cross-Border Trade
nodes.desc: Program supporting sellers in international marketplace expansion.

nodes.name: CSV Upload
nodes.desc: File-based bulk listing tool allowing sellers to upload spreadsheets with multiple listings at once.

nodes.name: Curated Lists
nodes.desc: Alternative naming for Hand-Picked Collections emphasizing expert selection and thematic organization for mobile discovery experience.

nodes.name: Currency Conversion
nodes.desc: Automatic price display in buyer's local currency with live exchange rates. Seller receives funds in listing currency, buyer pays in preferred currency.

nodes.name: Current Bid
nodes.desc: Real-time display of highest active bid amount in ongoing auction, automatically updating as new bids are placed by competitors.

nodes.name: Custom Label
nodes.desc: Seller-created tags (SKU, supplier, season, campaign) for internal inventory organization. Not visible to buyers. Used for reporting, promotions, and catalog management.

nodes.name: Custom Template
nodes.desc: Seller-created listing template with unique branding, layout, and formatting distinct from eBay-provided default templates.

nodes.name: Cyber Monday
nodes.desc: Annual post-Thanksgiving online shopping event with tech/electronics focus, $5-10 off coupons for app users, free shipping promotions.

nodes.name: Daily Deals
nodes.desc: Time-limited daily offers with significant discounts.

nodes.name: Daily Payout
nodes.desc: Standard payout cadence depositing funds to seller bank account daily (next business day). Default for Managed Payments sellers. Replaces PayPal instant access.

nodes.name: Deals Seller Portal
nodes.desc: Seller dashboard for submitting and managing deals submissions.

nodes.name: Debit Card
nodes.desc: Direct debit card payment processing through eBay Managed Payments.

nodes.name: Decline Offer
nodes.desc: Seller action to reject buyer's Best Offer without negotiation.

nodes.name: Delivered
nodes.desc: Completion status with timestamp and location confirming package was successfully received or left at designated delivery point.

nodes.name: Delivery Exception
nodes.desc: Alert status indicating shipping delay or issue requiring attention, such as incorrect address, refused delivery, or weather disruption.

nodes.name: Delivery Status
nodes.desc: Real-time shipment tracking notification stream showing package location, carrier scans, expected delivery date, and delivery confirmation with mobile push support.

nodes.name: Delivery Updates
nodes.desc: Alternative naming for Delivery Status emphasizing proactive notifications for shipping delays, delivery exceptions, and signature-required alerts.

nodes.name: Description Builder
nodes.desc: Guided listing description creation tool with category-specific templates, seller notes, and AI-suggested product details for desktop and mobile.

nodes.name: Description Template
nodes.desc: Pre-formatted listing description HTML with brand headers, product tables, and return policies saved for consistent cross-listing presentation.

nodes.name: Description Templates
nodes.desc: Pre-built listing description layouts with seller branding, policies, and product sections. Saves time for consistent multi-listing creation. 50+ templates in Seller Hub.

nodes.name: Detailed Seller Ratings
nodes.desc: 5-star rating system for communication, shipping speed, shipping costs, and item description accuracy.

nodes.name: Detailed Seller Ratings (DSRs)
nodes.desc: 4-category buyer ratings (Item as Described, Communication, Shipping Time, Shipping Cost) on 1-5 star scale. Legacy system being phased out in favor of binary feedback. Still active in all markets but no longer impacts search ranking as of 2022. Translation: DE 'Detaillierte Verkäuferbewertungen', FR 'Évaluations détaillées du vendeur', IT 'Valutazione dettagliata del venditore'.

nodes.name: Developer Loyalty Program
nodes.desc: Rewards program for active API developers and partners.

nodes.name: DHL Paket
nodes.desc: Germany's primary parcel service integrated with eBay for discounted label printing, tracking, and Packstation delivery to automated lockers.

nodes.name: Digest Notifications
nodes.desc: Batched notification delivery mode consolidating non-urgent updates into daily or weekly summaries to reduce notification fatigue for mobile users.

nodes.name: Discounts Manager
nodes.desc: Tool for creating and managing promotional discounts and sales events.

nodes.name: Discounts Manager
nodes.desc: Promotional tools suite enabling sellers to create sale events, volume discounts, and coupons. Localized naming: DE 'Verkaufsaktionen' (sales promotions), FR 'Boosteur de ventes' (sales booster), IT 'Gestore delle promozioni' (promotions manager). Features differ slightly by market due to local commerce practices.

nodes.name: Distance: Nearest First
nodes.desc: Sort option prioritizing items closest to buyer's location, useful for local pickup, heavy items, and fast delivery preference.

nodes.name: Draft Listings
nodes.desc: Saved incomplete listings that can be finished and published later, stored for up to 90 days.

nodes.name: Drafts
nodes.desc: Saved incomplete listings stored on server with auto-save functionality, accessible across desktop and mobile for asynchronous listing creation.

nodes.name: Duplicate Listing
nodes.desc: Bulk listing tool creating exact copy of existing listing for sellers with multiple identical items to sell.

nodes.name: eBay Academy
nodes.desc: Educational program with courses, certifications, and seller training resources. Status unverified 2026-04-29: Seller Center URL returns 404, ebay.academy domain unreachable. May have been renamed to 'Seller Clinics' or discontinued.

nodes.name: eBay Academy
nodes.desc: Seller education platform with localized content for each market. Courses, webinars, and certifications adapted to local selling practices, tax laws, and buyer behavior. German Academy emphasizes precision/compliance, French focuses on customer service, US on growth/scaling.

nodes.name: eBay.ai Message Assistance
nodes.desc: AI-powered message drafting and response suggestions for sellers.

nodes.name: eBay Ambassador
nodes.desc: Community leader program for experienced sellers helping others.

nodes.name: eBay Assured Fit
nodes.desc: UK version of fitment guarantee for automotive parts compatibility.

nodes.name: eBay Australia
nodes.desc: Australian marketplace (ebay.com.au) with AUD currency, Australia Post integration, GST collection, localized categories (AFL, cricket memorabilia).

nodes.name: eBay Authenticate
nodes.desc: Original authentication program for luxury goods. Replaced by Authenticity Guarantee in 2020.

nodes.name: eBay Balance
nodes.desc: Spendable funds account for holding eBay earnings and promotional credits. US and UK only.

nodes.name: eBay Bucks
nodes.desc: US-only buyer rewards program offering 1-2% cashback on purchases. Ended April 2, 2024, replaced by eBay Mastercard rewards.

nodes.name: eBay Business Supply
nodes.desc: B2B marketplace for business and industrial supplies available globally across all 190 markets.

nodes.name: eBay Buyer Guarantee
nodes.desc: Regional variant of buyer protection programs ensuring safe transactions.

nodes.name: eBay Canada
nodes.desc: Canadian marketplace (ebay.ca) with CAD currency, bilingual (English/French) interface, Canada Post shipping, cross-border tax handling.

nodes.name: eBay Collection Points
nodes.desc: Network of retail locations for buyer pickup and returns.

nodes.name: eBay Collection Points
nodes.desc: UK network of 10,000+ Collect+ locations (newsagents, convenience stores) for eBay parcel collection. Buyers collect with barcode/ID. Seller ships to distribution hub, eBay handles last-mile to collection point. Alternative to home delivery. Partnership with Yodel/Collect+.

nodes.name: eBay Community
nodes.desc: Forums and discussion boards for buyer and seller support and networking.

nodes.name: eBay Community
nodes.desc: User forums and discussion boards with separate communities per market. US community largest (150k+ members), German community most active per capita. Moderated by eBay staff and volunteer 'Community Hosts'. Language-specific forums enable peer-to-peer support in native languages.

nodes.name: eBay Concierge
nodes.desc: Premium seller support service with dedicated assistance.

nodes.name: eBay Customer Service
nodes.desc: Customer support platform providing help with transactions, technical issues, and policy questions.

nodes.name: eBay Deals
nodes.desc: Curated deals hub featuring discounts and special offers across categories.

nodes.name: eBay Deals
nodes.desc: Curated daily deals program with global brand but market-specific merchandising. Same name globally but deal selection, discount depth, and featured categories vary by market. US focuses on electronics/home, UK emphasizes fashion/motors, DE strong in Heimwerker (DIY).

nodes.name: eBay Developers Program
nodes.desc: Developer ecosystem with APIs, documentation, and integration tools.

nodes.name: eBay Exclusive Coupons
nodes.desc: Platform-issued coupons for promotional campaigns and buyer retention.

nodes.name: eBay Export
nodes.desc: Export management tool for international trade compliance and documentation.

nodes.name: eBay for Charity
nodes.desc: Charitable giving program allowing sellers to donate portions of sales to registered nonprofits.

nodes.name: eBay for Charity
nodes.desc: Charitable giving program allowing sellers to donate 10-100% of proceeds to verified nonprofits. Implementation varies by market: US integrates PayPal Giving Fund, UK uses JustGiving, DE partners with betterplace.org. Over $1B raised globally since 2003. IT uses different branding ('Aste di beneficenza' - charity auctions).

nodes.name: eBay France
nodes.desc: French marketplace (ebay.fr) with EUR currency, French language, Colissimo/Chronopost shipping, EU consumer protection compliance.

nodes.name: eBay Fulfilment
nodes.desc: eBay-managed fulfillment service for inventory storage, packing, and shipping.

nodes.name: eBay Fulfilment
nodes.desc: UK-specific fulfillment service with warehouse storage and shipping.

nodes.name: eBay Germany
nodes.desc: German marketplace (ebay.de) with EUR currency, localized categories, DHL/Hermes shipping, German consumer protection laws (14-day returns mandatory).

nodes.name: eBay Gift Cards
nodes.desc: Digital and physical gift cards for eBay purchases. Official in US, CA, AU; limited in DE, FR, IT; third-party in UK.

nodes.name: eBay Guaranteed Delivery
nodes.desc: Guaranteed delivery date program with refunds if items arrive late.

nodes.name: eBay Guaranteed Fit
nodes.desc: Fitment guarantee for auto parts ensuring compatibility with buyer's vehicle. US program launched October 2025 as 'Fitment Plus Auto'.

nodes.name: eBay Imperdibili
nodes.desc: Italy-exclusive deals program with Best Price Guarantee. Launched 2012 as regional deals brand.

nodes.name: eBay Imperdibili
nodes.desc: Italy-exclusive deals program. Name means 'unmissable' or 'don't miss'. Features rotating daily deals in key categories (electronics, fashion, home). Separate merchandising from eBay Deals. Emphasizes scarcity and limited-time nature.

nodes.name: eBay International Shipping
nodes.desc: International shipping service for US and Canada sellers, replacing Global Shipping Program in July 2023.

nodes.name: eBay international standard delivery
nodes.desc: Standard international shipping service. Deprecated in favor of eBay International Shipping.

nodes.name: eBay Italy
nodes.desc: Italian marketplace (ebay.it) with EUR currency, Italian language, Poste Italiane integration, localized fashion/luxury categories.

nodes.name: eBay Live
nodes.desc: Livestream shopping platform allowing sellers to host live video sales events with real-time bidding. Canonical URL: ebay.com/ebaylive (no hyphen — ebay.com/ebay-live redirects to error).

nodes.name: eBay Mastercard
nodes.desc: Co-branded credit card offering rewards on eBay purchases. Ending March 24, 2026.

nodes.name: eBay Mobile App
nodes.desc: Native iOS and Android mobile application providing full eBay marketplace access with camera-based listing creation, barcode scanning, push notifications, and mobile-optimized buying/selling experience.

nodes.name: eBay Motors Parts & Accessories
nodes.desc: Sub-vertical for automotive parts, tires, tools, accessories with compatibility fitment tables, VIN lookup, OEM/aftermarket filters.

nodes.name: eBay Partner Network
nodes.desc: Affiliate marketing program for earning commissions on referred traffic and sales.

nodes.name: eBay Picture Services
nodes.desc: Deprecated image hosting service (2000-2019) providing free photo storage, resizing, and gallery view before migration to seller-hosted uploads.

nodes.name: eBay Plus
nodes.desc: Paid membership offering fast free shipping and exclusive deals. €19.90/year in Germany, $4.99/month or $49/year in Australia.

nodes.name: eBay Plus
nodes.desc: Premium paid membership offering fast free shipping, exclusive deals, and enhanced customer service in Germany (€19.90/year) and Australia ($49/year).

nodes.name: eBay Plus
nodes.desc: Premium membership program (€19.90-49.90/year) offering free expedited shipping, exclusive deals, and priority support. Available in DE (2017), AU (2018). Similar to Amazon Prime concept. Sellers opt-in, eBay subsidizes shipping for Plus-eligible items. DE version most mature.

nodes.name: eBay Premium Service
nodes.desc: UK-specific badge replacing Top Rated Plus for sellers meeting premium service standards.

nodes.name: eBay Premium Service
nodes.desc: UK-specific branding for Top Rated Plus. Indicates fast dispatch (1 business day), tracked delivery, and 30-day returns from trusted sellers. Shown as green badge on listings. Higher bar than standard Top Rated Seller status.

nodes.name: eBay Premium Services
nodes.desc: Collection of premium buyer protection and service programs.

nodes.name: eBay Rachat
nodes.desc: France-specific buyback and trade-in program for electronics.

nodes.name: eBay Radio
nodes.desc: Weekly podcast/webinar series featuring eBay experts discussing selling strategies, platform updates, and seller success stories. Discontinued 2019.

nodes.name: eBay Refurbished
nodes.desc: Four-tier certified refurbished program with professional inspections, warranties, and return guarantees across Certified, Excellent, Very Good, and Good conditions.

nodes.name: eBay Refurbished Warranty
nodes.desc: 2-year Allstate warranty covering refurbished products sold through eBay Refurbished program.

nodes.name: eBay Selling App
nodes.desc: Dedicated mobile-first selling application with AI-powered Magical Listing creation, barcode scanning for quick listing, photo optimization, and streamlined order management for mobile sellers.

nodes.name: eBay Spain
nodes.desc: Spanish marketplace (ebay.es) with EUR currency, Spanish language, Correos shipping, localized categories (La Liga memorabilia).

nodes.name: eBay SpeedPAK
nodes.desc: Shipping program for German sellers and China-to-global shipments. Launched January 2026 with 10% discount promotion.

nodes.name: eBay Standard Envelope
nodes.desc: Low-cost tracked shipping option for small, lightweight items like trading cards. US-only.

nodes.name: eBay Stores
nodes.desc: Subscription-based customizable storefronts offering reduced fees, marketing tools, and enhanced seller branding across multiple tiers.

nodes.name: eBay Stores - Basic
nodes.desc: Entry-level store subscription tier, renamed to Starter in 2021. (Starter tier not yet in registry.)

nodes.name: eBay Stores - Enterprise
nodes.desc: Highest US store tier with 100,000 free listings, priority customer support, and dedicated account management.

nodes.name: eBay Stores
nodes.desc: Subscription-based seller storefronts with market-specific pricing and features. US: 5 tiers ($7.95-$299.95/mo), UK: 4 tiers (£14.99-£199.99/mo), DE: 4 tiers (€14.99-€199.99/mo). Tiers named differently: US has 'Enterprise', DE has 'Platin-Shop', IT has 'Premium Plus'.

nodes.name: eBay Stores - Premium
nodes.desc: Mid-tier store subscription offering 10,000 free listings, markdown manager, and advanced marketing tools.

nodes.name: eBay Top-Service
nodes.desc: Germany-specific seller badge launched February 2024 replacing eBay Plus seller badges.

nodes.name: eBay Top-Service
nodes.desc: German branding for premium seller service. Requirements: 1-day dispatch, tracked shipping with Deutsche Post/DHL, 30-day returns, <0.5% defects. Provides search boost and visibility in 'Top-Service' filter. Distinct from eBay Plus membership program.

nodes.name: eBay UK
nodes.desc: United Kingdom marketplace (ebay.co.uk) with GBP currency, UK-specific categories (British collectibles, football memorabilia), VAT handling, Royal Mail integration.

nodes.name: eBay University
nodes.desc: Original seller education program, replaced by eBay Academy and Seller Centre resources.

nodes.name: eBay Valet
nodes.desc: Original consignment service where eBay sold items for sellers. Ended 2018. Limited luxury version launched 2023.

nodes.name: eBay Vault
nodes.desc: Secure storage and authentication service for high-value collectibles including trading cards. US-only program. Physical vault operation sold to PSA (Collectors) May 2024 but consumer brand remains 'eBay Vault' at ebay.com/vault. My eBay navigation shows 'PSA Vault' label — possible gradual name transition. 'Send to PSA Vault' checkout feature launched November 2025.

nodes.name: eBay WOW!
nodes.desc: Germany-exclusive daily deals program with limited-time offers. Launched 2009, highly successful regional brand.

nodes.name: eBay WOW!
nodes.desc: Germany-exclusive flash deal program featuring single product each weekday with deep discounts (30-70% off). Runs Monday-Friday with 24-hour deal windows. Highly promoted on eBay.de homepage. Different branding from global 'eBay Deals' to create urgency.

nodes.name: Edit Listing
nodes.desc: Active listing modification button allowing price changes, photo updates, description edits, and quantity adjustments without relisting.

nodes.name: Edit Payment
nodes.desc: Checkout modification option to change payment method or billing address before transaction submission.

nodes.name: Email Alerts
nodes.desc: Alternative naming for Email Notifications emphasizing urgency and immediate attention required (price alerts, bidding activity, best offers).

nodes.name: Email Notifications
nodes.desc: Email alerts for account activity, purchases, sales, messages, and policy updates sent to registered email address.

nodes.name: Email to Friend
nodes.desc: Original sharing feature allowing buyers to forward listing links via email form. Deprecated in favor of native Share buttons.

nodes.name: End Listing
nodes.desc: Immediate termination action removing listing from search before scheduled expiration, used when item sells elsewhere or becomes unavailable.

nodes.name: End Listing Early
nodes.desc: Seller action to terminate active listing before scheduled end time. For auctions with bids, can cancel with bid retraction. Excessive use triggers seller defects.

nodes.name: Ended Listings
nodes.desc: Seller Hub view showing all completed auction listings and expired fixed-price listings.

nodes.name: Ending Soon
nodes.desc: Sort option showing auctions ending within 1-24 hours, creating urgency for last-minute bidding and deal discovery.

nodes.name: Ends Soon
nodes.desc: Urgency indicator highlighting auctions or listings ending within the next few hours.

nodes.name: Estimated Delivery
nodes.desc: Calculated date range when buyer can expect to receive item, based on handling time and carrier transit time.

nodes.name: EU Consumer Rights Directive
nodes.desc: European law mandating 14-day return window for distance sales, requiring sellers to accept returns regardless of stated policy. Enforced on EU marketplaces.

nodes.name: Excellent - Refurbished
nodes.desc: Top-tier refurbished condition with minimal wear, full functionality, and comprehensive warranty.

nodes.name: Expedited International Shipping
nodes.desc: Premium cross-border shipping with 6-10 business day delivery via FedEx/UPS/DHL. Includes tracking, insurance, signature confirmation.

nodes.name: Export Academy
nodes.desc: Training program for sellers interested in international trade and cross-border selling.

nodes.name: Express Payouts
nodes.desc: Faster payout processing for eligible sellers.

nodes.name: Express Payouts (Multi-Currency)
nodes.desc: Expedited payout option available in Managed Payments supporting USD, GBP, EUR, AUD, CAD. Releases funds within hours instead of days for fee. Currency conversion handled at payout time with transparent FX rates shown.

nodes.name: Fast and Free
nodes.desc: Combined shipping badge indicating both expedited delivery timeline and zero shipping cost to buyer's location.

nodes.name: Fast 'N Free
nodes.desc: Shipping badge for fast free delivery. Being replaced by specific day-count badges (Free 2-day, 3-day, 4-day shipping).

nodes.name: Father's Day Gifts
nodes.desc: June seasonal campaign featuring tools, tech, automotive, sports memorabilia with gift wrapping options and guaranteed Father's Day delivery.

nodes.name: Featured Deals
nodes.desc: Premium placement for highlighted promotional offers.

nodes.name: Featured First
nodes.desc: Premium listing placement option that positions listings at the top of search results within their category.

nodes.name: Featured Listing
nodes.desc: Premium placement in search results and category pages. Largely replaced by Promoted Listings.

nodes.name: Fee Illustrator
nodes.desc: Listing preview tool showing estimated eBay fees (insertion, final value, upgrade) before publishing. Helps sellers price competitively while maintaining profit margins.

nodes.name: Feed
nodes.desc: Mobile-first personalized content stream showing new listings from followed sellers, price drops, recommendations, and trending deals with infinite scroll.

nodes.name: Feedback Extortion Policy
nodes.desc: Prohibition against buyers threatening negative feedback to extort refunds, free items, or other concessions. Violators receive feedback removal and account restrictions.

nodes.name: Feedback Left
nodes.desc: Completion status confirming buyer's review was published to seller's profile, with reminder that feedback is permanent and public.

nodes.name: Feedback Reply
nodes.desc: Ability for sellers to respond to feedback left by buyers.

nodes.name: Feedback Reply
nodes.desc: Sellers can post 80-character public response to feedback received. Cannot alter original feedback but provides context. Used to address negative feedback professionally. Translation: DE 'Bewertungsantwort' (evaluation answer), FR 'Réponse à l'évaluation', IT 'Risposta al feedback'.

nodes.name: Feedback Revision Request
nodes.desc: Request buyer to revise negative or neutral feedback after issue resolution.

nodes.name: Feedback Revision Request
nodes.desc: Sellers can request buyers revise negative/neutral feedback after resolving issue. Buyer not obligated to revise. ~30% revision rate when issue resolved satisfactorily. Translation: DE 'Bewertungsänderungsanfrage' (evaluation change request), FR 'Demande de révision évaluation', IT 'Richiesta revisione feedback'.

nodes.name: File Exchange
nodes.desc: CSV-based bulk listing and inventory management tool. Replaced by Seller Hub Reports.

nodes.name: Filter By
nodes.desc: Refinement sidebar panel with checkboxes for price range, condition, brand, location, shipping options, and listing format.

nodes.name: Find It On eBay
nodes.desc: Browser extension and mobile feature for finding items on eBay while browsing other sites.

nodes.name: Fine Art
nodes.desc: Category for paintings, sculptures, prints, photography with artist verification, provenance tracking, authenticity certification requirements for $1,000+ pieces.

nodes.name: Fitment Compatibility
nodes.desc: Database matching auto parts to specific vehicle years/makes/models. Sellers upload compatibility data, buyers search by their vehicle for guaranteed fit parts.

nodes.name: Fitment Plus
nodes.desc: Advanced fitment tool for automotive parts compatibility verification.

nodes.name: Fitment Plus Auto
nodes.desc: Enhanced version of Fitment Plus with eBay Guaranteed Fit protection, launched October 2025.

nodes.name: Fixed Price Format
nodes.desc: Buy It Now listing format with set price, allowing immediate purchase without bidding.

nodes.name: Flash Deals
nodes.desc: Time-limited offers (1-6 hours) with countdown timer creating urgency. Mobile push notification alerts, 50-90% off clearance inventory.

nodes.name: Flat Rate Shipping
nodes.desc: Simplified shipping option charging same rate to all domestic buyers regardless of location, seller-defined amount.

nodes.name: Follow Seller
nodes.desc: Alternative naming for Saved Seller using social media-inspired terminology with new listing alerts and promotional content in Feed tab.

nodes.name: Following
nodes.desc: Social feature enabling buyers to follow favorite sellers, brands, and categories for personalized feed updates.

nodes.name: Form 1099-K
nodes.desc: US tax reporting form for payment card and third-party network transactions.

nodes.name: Form 1099-K (US)
nodes.desc: US tax reporting for sellers exceeding IRS thresholds ($600+ annual GMV as of 2024). eBay issues 1099-K forms reporting payment card transactions to IRS. Available in Seller Hub > Payments > Tax documents. Threshold was $20k/200 transactions pre-2024.

nodes.name: Free 2-day Shipping
nodes.desc: Listing badge for items with free 2-day delivery, replacing Fast 'N Free branding.

nodes.name: Free 2-Day Shipping
nodes.desc: US-only badge for listings offering free 2-day delivery. Seller commitment to dispatch within 1 day + 2-day shipping method (typically USPS Priority or UPS 2-Day). Search filter and badge drive conversion. Competitive with Amazon Prime 2-day standard.

nodes.name: Free 3-day Shipping
nodes.desc: Listing badge for items with free 3-day delivery.

nodes.name: Free 4-day Shipping
nodes.desc: Listing badge for items with free 4-day delivery.

nodes.name: Free 4-Day Shipping
nodes.desc: US budget expedited shipping option slower than 2/3-day but faster than standard ground. Typically USPS Priority Mail or FedEx Ground with 4-day commitment. Used by sellers balancing speed and cost.

nodes.name: Free Returns
nodes.desc: Seller-provided return shipping at no cost to buyer, earning search visibility boost and buyer trust badge.

nodes.name: Free Shipping
nodes.desc: Shipping option where seller absorbs shipping costs, often boosting search placement and conversion rates.

nodes.name: Free Shipping Badge
nodes.desc: Prominent search result and listing page badge highlighting seller's offer of no-cost delivery, boosting conversion and Best Match ranking.

nodes.name: Free Shipping Filter
nodes.desc: Search refinement to show only listings with no shipping cost to buyer. High-engagement filter driving 30%+ higher conversion rates.

nodes.name: Free Shipping Threshold
nodes.desc: Seller promotion offering free shipping when cart total exceeds specified amount (e.g., Free shipping over $50). Drives multi-item purchases, higher AOV.

nodes.name: Freight Shipping
nodes.desc: Specialized shipping service for large, heavy items requiring pallet or truck delivery with liftgate and white glove options.

nodes.name: Full Refund
nodes.desc: Complete purchase price refund including original shipping, issued for returns or resolved cases.

nodes.name: Gallery
nodes.desc: Standard thumbnail image display in search results, now included free with all listings.

nodes.name: Gallery Picture
nodes.desc: Primary listing thumbnail displayed in search results and category browse, auto-generated from first uploaded photo with mobile-optimized sizing.

nodes.name: Gallery Plus
nodes.desc: Enhanced image display with larger thumbnails in search results.

nodes.name: GDPR Compliance
nodes.desc: EU General Data Protection Regulation implementation allowing users to access, export, delete personal data. Includes cookie consent, data portability rights.

nodes.name: General Campaign
nodes.desc: Standard ad campaign type with broad placement across search results and category pages.

nodes.name: Get Alerts
nodes.desc: Saved search notification subscription enabling email or push alerts when new listings match specified search criteria.

nodes.name: Global Shipping Program
nodes.desc: International shipping program operated by Pitney Bowes. Consolidated into eBay International Shipping in 2024.

nodes.name: Global Shipping Toggle
nodes.desc: Seller setting to enable/disable international shipping per listing. Auto-calculates customs, shows total landed cost to buyers, manages export compliance.

nodes.name: Go to Checkout
nodes.desc: Primary call-to-action button on listing pages and cart redirecting buyers to payment and shipping confirmation on desktop and mobile.

nodes.name: Goldin Auctions
nodes.desc: Partnership with premier collectibles auction house for high-end trading cards and memorabilia.

nodes.name: Good - Refurbished
nodes.desc: Entry-tier refurbished condition with noticeable wear but full functionality and basic warranty.

nodes.name: Good Til Cancelled
nodes.desc: Listing format that automatically renews every 30 days until cancelled.

nodes.name: Google Pay

Required in many categories for search visibility. eBay auto-populates listing details from product database when identifier provided. Translation: DE 'Produktkennungen', FR 'Identifiants de produit', IT 'Identificativi del prodotto'.

nodes.name: Product Research
nodes.desc: Market research tool (formerly Terapeak) providing sales data, pricing trends, and demand analytics for sellers.

nodes.name: Product Reviews
nodes.desc: Product-level reviews aggregated across all sellers of the same item.

nodes.name: Product Video
nodes.desc: Mobile-first feature enabling sellers to upload short-form videos (up to 30 seconds) showcasing product functionality, condition, and details.

nodes.name: Prohibited Items List
nodes.desc: Policy document detailing items banned from sale: weapons, drugs, tobacco, alcohol (most markets), recalled products, hazmat, human remains, stolen goods.

nodes.name: Prohibited & Restricted Items by Country
nodes.desc: Country-specific restrictions varying by market (e.g., knives restricted UK, alcohol prohibited most markets, Nazi memorabilia banned Germany).

nodes.name: Promote Similar Items
nodes.desc: In-listing module showcasing seller's other items in same category. Drives multi-item purchases and store traffic. Automatically generated based on category and item specifics.

nodes.name: Promote Your Listing
nodes.desc: Advertising enrollment button enabling sellers to boost visibility through paid search placement with cost-per-sale model.

nodes.name: Promoted Brand
nodes.desc: Brand-focused advertising products for manufacturers and authorized retailers.

nodes.name: Promoted Listings
nodes.desc: Pay-per-sale advertising program increasing listing visibility in search results and browse pages.

nodes.name: Promoted Listings Advanced
nodes.desc: Premium promoted listings with cost-per-click pricing and advanced targeting options. Renamed to Promoted Listings Priority in Summer 2024.

nodes.name: Promoted Listings Dashboard
nodes.desc: Campaign management interface for setting ad rates (1-20%), pausing/activating promotions, and viewing ROAS, impressions, clicks, sales by listing.

nodes.name: Promoted Listings Express
nodes.desc: Automated promoted listings variant with simplified campaign management. Deprecated globally April 2024 (Germany July 2023).

nodes.name: Promoted Listings General
nodes.desc: Cost-per-sale (CPC) advertising product boosting listings in on-site search results. Renamed from Promoted Listings Standard in Summer 2024.

nodes.name: Promoted Listings Priority
nodes.desc: Premium CPC advertising with priority placement in search and homepage. Renamed from Promoted Listings Advanced in Summer 2024. Exclusive top ad slots added January 2026.

nodes.name: Promoted Listings Standard
nodes.desc: Basic promoted listings tier with cost-per-sale pricing. Renamed to Promoted Listings General in Summer 2024.

nodes.name: Promoted Offsite
nodes.desc: External advertising program promoting eBay listings on Google, Facebook, and other platforms with cost-per-sale pricing.

nodes.name: Promoted Stores
nodes.desc: Store-level advertising increasing visibility of entire storefronts in search.

nodes.name: Promoted Stores Custom
nodes.desc: Custom store promotion campaigns with tailored visibility and targeting options.

nodes.name: Promoted Stores
nodes.desc: Store-level advertising product promoting entire storefronts in search and browse. Set ad rate for all store inventory collectively. UK uses 'Promoted Shops' terminology. Available in all major markets with localized bidding and reporting interfaces.

nodes.name: Promoted to International
nodes.desc: Deprecated paid upgrade for international listing visibility, made free in 2019 and merged into International Site Visibility.

nodes.name: Promotional Codes
nodes.desc: Alphanumeric codes for discounts entered at checkout.

nodes.name: Promotional Credit
nodes.desc: eBay-issued vouchers ($5-100) for service failures, retention offers, survey incentives, influencer partnerships. 30-90 day expiration.

nodes.name: Promotions Manager
nodes.desc: Centralized platform for creating and managing all promotional campaigns. Renamed to Seller Hub Discounts. URL pages.ebay.com/promotionsmanager now redirects to /sellercenter/growth/seller-hub-promotions.

nodes.name: ProSeller Growth Program
nodes.desc: Australia-specific seller development program for emerging high-volume sellers. Provides coaching, fee waivers during growth phase, and dedicated account management. Focused on scaling Australian small businesses to international sales.

nodes.name: Proxy Bidding
nodes.desc: eBay's automated bidding mechanism that bids on your behalf up to your specified maximum amount.

nodes.name: Purchase History
nodes.desc: Complete record of all items purchased on eBay, accessible in My eBay for order tracking and repurchasing.

nodes.name: Purchase Limits
nodes.desc: Restriction setting limiting maximum quantity a single buyer can purchase within a time period.

nodes.name: Purchase Protection
nodes.desc: Umbrella term for buyer protection programs covering various purchase types.

nodes.name: Push Notifications
nodes.desc: Mobile app alerts for outbid notices, shipping updates, offers, and messages delivered to device lock screen.

nodes.name: Quantity Available
nodes.desc: Number of units currently in stock and available for purchase in a fixed-price listing.

nodes.name: Quantity Limits
nodes.desc: Seller control restricting the maximum quantity a single buyer can purchase in one transaction.

nodes.name: Quantity Selector
nodes.desc: Dropdown or stepper UI component on listing page and cart enabling buyers to select quantity for multi-quantity listings before purchase.

nodes.name: Quick Listing Tool
nodes.desc: Simplified listing creation for fast item posting.

nodes.name: Quick Listing Tool
nodes.desc: Simplified listing creation flow for straightforward items. Localized workflows adapt to market norms: DE emphasizes item specifics accuracy, UK includes postage options upfront, FR highlights condition disclosure. Translation: DE 'Schnelles Angebots-Tool', FR 'Outil de mise en vente rapide', IT 'Strumento di inserzione rapida'.

nodes.name: Real-Time Notifications
nodes.desc: Instant push alerts for time-sensitive events (auction ending, outbid, best offer received, payment received) delivered within seconds via mobile OS notification framework.

nodes.name: Real-Time Tracking
nodes.desc: Live package location updates integrated with carrier APIs (USPS, FedEx, UPS) showing on map view in mobile app with push notifications for status changes.

nodes.name: Recently Viewed
nodes.desc: History of items recently browsed by the user.

nodes.name: Recently Viewed
nodes.desc: Browsing history feature showing last 50-100 viewed items. Localized naming: German 'Kürzlich angesehen' (recently viewed), French 'Récemment consultés' (recently consulted), Italian 'Visti di recente' (seen recently). Privacy settings vary by market due to GDPR (EU) vs CCPA (US).

nodes.name: Refine Search
nodes.desc: Advanced filtering panel with category-specific attributes like size, color, brand, model, year for targeted product discovery.

nodes.name: Refund Issued
nodes.desc: Final transaction status confirming funds returned to original payment method, typically appearing within 3-5 business days.

nodes.name: Relist
nodes.desc: One-click relisting of unsold or ended items.

nodes.name: Relist Item
nodes.desc: One-click republishing of ended unsold listing with original details, optionally adjusting price or photos based on initial performance.

nodes.name: Reply to Feedback
nodes.desc: Seller response option adding public follow-up comment below buyer's negative or neutral feedback to explain circumstances.

nodes.name: Report Buyer
nodes.desc: Seller tool to flag buyers for non-payment, abusive messages, feedback extortion, or repeat return abuse. Triggers Trust & Safety investigation.

nodes.name: Report This Item
nodes.desc: Reporting tool for buyers to flag counterfeit items, prohibited listings, intellectual property violations, or suspicious activity. Triggers Trust & Safety review.

nodes.name: Request Feedback Revision
nodes.desc: Seller-initiated appeal asking buyer to modify negative feedback after issue resolution, requiring buyer consent to change.

nodes.name: Request Return
nodes.desc: Return initiation button in order details launching reason selection workflow for item doesn't match description, damaged, or changed mind scenarios.

nodes.name: Request Total
nodes.desc: Buyer action asking seller to provide combined shipping quote before payment for multiple purchases.

nodes.name: Reserve Met
nodes.desc: Auction status confirming bidding has exceeded the seller's reserve price and item will sell.

nodes.name: Reserve Not Met
nodes.desc: Auction status indicator showing the reserve price has not been reached by current bidding.

nodes.name: Reserve Price
nodes.desc: Hidden minimum price in auctions below which item won't sell.

nodes.name: Reserve Price
nodes.desc: Minimum acceptable auction price hidden from buyers. If reserve not met, seller not obligated to sell. More common in UK/DE (collectibles culture) than US. Translation: DE 'Mindestpreis' (minimum price), FR 'Prix de réserve' (reserve price), IT 'Prezzo di riserva'.

nodes.name: Resolution Center
nodes.desc: Legacy platform for managing disputes, returns, and buyer-seller conflicts. Being phased out in favor of simplified flows.

nodes.name: Resolution Center
nodes.desc: Dispute resolution platform for return requests, item not received claims, and refund cases. Workflows localized for market-specific consumer protection laws: EU has stronger buyer rights, US has seller-friendly arbitration. Translation: DE 'Resolution Center', FR 'Gestionnaire de litiges' (dispute manager), IT 'Spazio soluzioni' (solutions space).

nodes.name: Restocking Fee
nodes.desc: Fee charged to buyer for returning item in opened or non-original condition, up to 20% of item price.

nodes.name: Return Approved
nodes.desc: Buyer confirmation with return shipping label download link and deadline to ship item back to seller.

nodes.name: Return Preferences
nodes.desc: Seller-level default settings for return window (30/60 days), who pays return shipping, restocking fees, and international returns handling.

nodes.name: Return Received
nodes.desc: Delivery notification triggering seller's 2-business-day inspection window before automatic refund processing to buyer.

nodes.name: Return Requested
nodes.desc: Seller notification indicating buyer submitted return with reason, awaiting seller approval or counteroffer within 3 business days.

nodes.name: Return Shipped
nodes.desc: Tracking confirmation status showing buyer dropped package at carrier, with estimated refund date upon seller receipt.

nodes.name: Return to Sender
nodes.desc: Failed delivery status showing package is being sent back to seller due to undeliverable address or buyer unavailability.

nodes.name: Returns Accepted Filter
nodes.desc: Search refinement to show only listings where seller accepts returns (30-day, 60-day, or seller-specified policy). Trust signal filter.

nodes.name: Review Offer
nodes.desc: Seller Hub action button opening offer management interface to accept, decline, or counter buyer's price proposal.

nodes.name: Review Offers
nodes.desc: Seller Hub section for managing pending Best Offers requiring accept, decline, or counter action.

nodes.name: Revise Listing
nodes.desc: Edit tool for updating active listing details. Some changes restricted after bids/sales (title, category, format). Photos, description, price, quantity always editable.

nodes.name: Rich Text Editor
nodes.desc: Enhanced text formatting tool supporting bold, italic, bullets, tables, and hyperlinks in listing descriptions across desktop and mobile platforms.

nodes.name: Royal Mail Tracked 24
nodes.desc: UK-exclusive shipping service with tracking and 24-hour delivery target. Discounted rates via eBay shipping labels, Top Rated eligible.

nodes.name: Sale Events
nodes.desc: Scheduled promotional events with sitewide or category-specific sales.

nodes.name: Sale Events
nodes.desc: Time-limited sales across multiple listings. UK: 'Sales event' (singular), DE: 'Sonderaktion' (special promotion), FR: 'Événement promotionnel' (promotional event), IT: 'Vendite promozionali' (promotional sales). Used for seasonal sales, inventory clearance.

nodes.name: Sales Conversion Rate
nodes.desc: Percentage of listing views that result in sales, measuring overall listing effectiveness and buyer intent.

nodes.name: Sales Events
nodes.desc: Seller tool for creating coordinated multi-listing promotional events with custom branding and time-limited discounts.

nodes.name: Sales Report
nodes.desc: Detailed sales data with revenue, fees, and profit calculations.

nodes.name: Sales Report
nodes.desc: Downloadable transaction-level sales data (CSV). Includes item title, price, fees, buyer info, shipping. Used for accounting and inventory management. Translation: DE 'Verkaufsbericht', FR 'Rapport des ventes', IT 'Report vendite'. Exportable for 90 days.

nodes.name: Sales Reports
nodes.desc: Detailed reporting dashboard showing seller transaction history, revenue trends, and performance metrics.

nodes.name: Sales Reports Plus
nodes.desc: Advanced sales analytics with customizable date ranges and export options.

nodes.name: Sales Tax Collection
nodes.desc: Automated sales tax calculation and collection service for US sellers, handling state and local tax compliance.

nodes.name: Sales Tax / VAT Collection
nodes.desc: Automated tax collection system adapting to local market: US sales tax (state-level), UK/EU VAT (20% standard), AU GST (10%), CA GST/HST. eBay calculates, collects, and remits taxes on seller's behalf for qualifying transactions. Reduces seller compliance burden.

nodes.name: Same-Day Handling
nodes.desc: Seller commitment to ship item on the same day as purchase, improving buyer confidence and search placement.

nodes.name: Save for Later
nodes.desc: Feature allowing buyers to move items from cart to a saved list for future purchase consideration.

nodes.name: Saved
nodes.desc: Mobile app tab consolidating saved listings, searches, sellers, and categories for quick access and personalized shopping experience.

nodes.name: Saved Drafts
nodes.desc: Alternative naming for Drafts emphasizing intentional save action vs automatic draft creation in mobile selling app.

nodes.name: Saved Payment Methods
nodes.desc: Secure vault storing buyer credit cards, debit cards, PayPal accounts for one-click checkout. PCI-compliant tokenization, no card numbers stored on eBay servers.

nodes.name: Saved Searches
nodes.desc: Save search queries with email alerts for new matching listings.

nodes.name: Saved Searches
nodes.desc: Save search queries with notifications for new listings. Localization adapts to market-specific search behavior and language. French 'Recherches favorites' emphasizes favorites concept vs US functional 'Saved searches'. Supports cross-market searches (e.g., US buyer searching eBay DE).

nodes.name: Saved Seller
nodes.desc: Singular form of Saved Sellers appearing as action button on seller profile pages and store headers in mobile app.

nodes.name: Saved Sellers
nodes.desc: Feature enabling buyers to bookmark favorite sellers for new listing notifications and curated storefront access via desktop and mobile app.

nodes.name: Schedule Listing
nodes.desc: Ability to schedule listing start time for optimal visibility.

nodes.name: Schedule Listing
nodes.desc: Set listing to go live at future date/time (e.g., end auction Sunday evening for max bids). $0.10 fee. Optimizes listing timing for buyer traffic patterns, which vary by market: US peaks 8-10pm ET, UK 7-9pm GMT, DE 6-8pm CET.

nodes.name: Schedule Start Time
nodes.desc: Delayed publish option allowing sellers to set future launch date and time for strategic listing timing.

nodes.name: Scheduled Listing
nodes.desc: Allows sellers to create listings in advance with specific publish date/time for product launches, seasonal releases, or peak traffic timing. $0.10 fee per listing.

nodes.name: Scheduled Listings
nodes.desc: Feature allowing sellers to create listings in advance and schedule publication at optimal times for maximum visibility.

nodes.name: Search Filters
nodes.desc: Refinement options in search results for condition, price, shipping, brand, and other attributes.

nodes.name: Search Standing Dashboard
nodes.desc: Seller Hub report showing search visibility score, Best Match ranking factors, and defect penalties impacting search placement. Updated daily.

nodes.name: Seasonal Seller Standards
nodes.desc: Relaxed performance evaluation during Q4 (Oct-Dec) holiday surge extending handling time grace periods and defect rate thresholds by 20% to accommodate volume.

nodes.name: Second Chance Offer
nodes.desc: Offer sent to underbidders after auction ends if winning bidder doesn't pay or seller has duplicate items.

nodes.name: Secure Checkout
nodes.desc: Trust badge on payment page indicating SSL encryption and PCI compliance for credit card data protection.

nodes.name: Self-Hosted Images
nodes.desc: Option for sellers to host listing photos on external servers (Imgur, AWS) via URL linking instead of eBay-hosted uploads.

nodes.name: Sell Similar
nodes.desc: Create new listing using existing listing as template.

nodes.name: Sell Similar
nodes.desc: Clone existing listing to create new one with pre-populated fields. Popular for selling multiples of same item or listing variations. Localized: DE 'Ähnlichen Artikel verkaufen' (sell similar article), FR 'Vendre un article similaire', IT 'Vendi oggetto simile'. Saves 60-80% of listing time.

nodes.name: Sell-Through Rate
nodes.desc: Percentage of listed inventory that sells within specific timeframe, measuring demand and pricing effectiveness.

nodes.name: Seller Centre
nodes.desc: Educational hub providing seller guidance, best practices, policy information, and learning resources.

nodes.name: Seller Clinics
nodes.desc: Live and recorded training sessions for seller education and best practices.

nodes.name: Seller Community
nodes.desc: Online forum for seller networking, best practice sharing, and policy announcements. Includes regional boards, vertical-specific groups, and eBay staff participation.

nodes.name: Seller Coupon
nodes.desc: Promotional tool allowing sellers to create discount codes ($ off or % off) for targeted buyer segments, cart abandoners, or store subscribers. Tracked in marketing dashboard.

nodes.name: Seller Help
nodes.desc: Dedicated help center for seller-specific questions and guidance.

nodes.name: Seller Hub
nodes.desc: Centralized dashboard for managing eBay selling activities, listings, orders, and performance metrics. Replaced Selling Manager and Selling Manager Pro.

nodes.name: Seller Hub (Multi-Market)
nodes.desc: Localized versions of Seller Hub across 7 major markets. Each market has customized UI language, local compliance features (VAT in EU, GST in AU, sales tax in US), market-specific advertising programs, and regulatory notifications. Core functionality identical but regulatory modules differ.

nodes.name: Seller Hub Reports
nodes.desc: Comprehensive reporting suite within Seller Hub for sales, traffic, and performance analytics.

nodes.name: Seller Hub Reports
nodes.desc: Analytics dashboard with sales, traffic, and performance metrics. Reports localized for market-specific KPIs: US emphasizes conversion rate, DE tracks shipping precision, UK monitors returns rate. Translation: DE 'Berichte im Verkäufer-Cockpit Pro', FR 'Rapports du Hub vendeur', IT 'Scheda Reportistica della Console venditori'.

nodes.name: Seller Hub Tasks
nodes.desc: Actionable to-do list in Seller Hub showing awaiting shipment, buyer messages, returns, payment holds, listing renewals. Prioritized by urgency.

nodes.name: Seller Hub Discounts
nodes.desc: Promotions and discounts management tool within Seller Hub, renamed from Promotions Manager. Enables sellers to create volume pricing, order discounts, sale events, and coupon campaigns.

nodes.name: Seller Initiated Offers
nodes.desc: Direct discount offers sent by sellers to interested buyers.

nodes.name: Seller News
nodes.desc: Announcements and updates section in Seller Hub providing policy changes, new features, and important seller communications.

nodes.name: Seller Newsletter
nodes.desc: Monthly email digest for sellers highlighting policy changes, seasonal tips, feature launches, and success stories. Customized by seller tier (Above Standard, Top Rated, Stores).

nodes.name: Seller Pays Return Shipping
nodes.desc: Return policy option where seller provides prepaid return label for all returns, improving buyer confidence.

nodes.name: Seller Performance Standards
