nodes.desc: 3-tier seller performance system (Below Standard, Above Standard, Top Rated) based on defect rates and customer service metrics.

nodes.name: Seller Performance Standards (Multi-Market)
nodes.desc: Seller evaluation system with localized thresholds by market. Tracks defect rate, late shipment rate, cases/returns, and transaction issues. Standards vary: US requires <2% defects, UK/DE <3%. Impacts search ranking, selling limits, and fee discounts. Three tiers: Above Standard, Below Standard, Top Rated.

nodes.name: Seller Protections
nodes.desc: Protection for sellers against fraudulent chargebacks and buyer scams.

nodes.name: Seller Refurbished
nodes.desc: Seller-certified refurbished condition being phased out in select categories, replaced by eBay Refurbished program.

nodes.name: Seller Responded
nodes.desc: Notification badge indicating seller replied to inquiry, with unread message count and link to My eBay Messages inbox.

nodes.name: Seller Response
nodes.desc: Seller capability to publicly respond to buyer reviews and feedback, providing context or resolution information.

nodes.name: Seller Transaction Report
nodes.desc: Downloadable CSV of all transactions, fees, refunds, payouts for accounting integration. Includes order ID, buyer, amount, fees, net proceeds. Monthly tax summary included.

nodes.name: Seller Updates
nodes.desc: Quarterly announcement blog detailing fee changes, policy updates, new features, and platform roadmap. Required reading for serious sellers, often includes 60+ day advance notice.

nodes.name: Seller Verification
nodes.desc: Enhanced identity check for new sellers requiring government ID, business registration, or tax ID upload. Mandatory for high-value categories (luxury, electronics).

nodes.name: Selling Activity Notifications
nodes.desc: Seller-focused notification category covering new orders, payments received, listing status changes, and buyer messages with mobile push and email delivery.

nodes.name: Selling Coach
nodes.desc: Automated recommendation engine suggesting pricing, categories, item specifics based on listing analysis. Deprecated 2018, replaced by Listing Quality Report.

nodes.name: Selling Manager
nodes.desc: Basic seller tool for managing listings and sales, replaced by Seller Hub in 2017-2018.

nodes.name: Selling Manager Pro
nodes.desc: Advanced seller management tool with automation, bulk editing, and inventory management. Replaced by Seller Hub.

nodes.name: Selling Notifications
nodes.desc: Alternative naming for Selling Activity Notifications covering all seller-initiated and system-generated alerts for listing and order management.

nodes.name: Selling Preferences
nodes.desc: Seller account configuration for default listing duration, payment holds, automatic feedback, vacation mode, and cross-promotion settings.

nodes.name: Selling Restrictions
nodes.desc: Account limitations applied to sellers with policy violations, performance defects, or fraud signals. Restricts listing categories, quantity, or requires pre-approval.

nodes.name: Selling with AI
nodes.desc: AI-assisted listing creation with automated descriptions and optimization.

nodes.name: Send Coupon
nodes.desc: Feature for sending promotional coupons to buyer segments.

nodes.name: Send Invoice
nodes.desc: Seller tool to send revised total to buyer, adjusting for combined shipping, discounts, or tax corrections.

nodes.name: Send Message
nodes.desc: Private communication composer for post-purchase coordination about payment, shipping address updates, or delivery issues.

nodes.name: Send Offer
nodes.desc: Offer submission button transmitting buyer's proposed price to seller for review, acceptance, counter-offer, or rejection.

nodes.name: Send Refund
nodes.desc: Seller action to issue money back to buyer through eBay's payment system or original payment method.

nodes.name: Services de paiement proposés par eBay
nodes.desc: French version of Managed Payments supporting French bank accounts, SEPA transfers, and Euro processing. Localized for French accounting practices and tax reporting requirements.

nodes.name: Session Duration
nodes.desc: Average time buyers spend viewing listing page and related content during browsing session.

nodes.name: Session Expired
nodes.desc: Security timeout message prompting re-login after 20 minutes of inactivity to protect account from unauthorized access.

nodes.name: Shake to Search
nodes.desc: Mobile app Easter egg feature triggering random category search when device shaken. Removed 2019 due to low usage.

nodes.name: Share Listing
nodes.desc: Social sharing feature enabling buyers to send listing links via SMS, email, Facebook, Twitter, or Pinterest from mobile app and desktop.

nodes.name: Share This Item
nodes.desc: Social sharing buttons (Facebook, Twitter, Pinterest, Email, SMS) on item pages to drive viral traffic and gift discovery. 50M+ shares monthly.

nodes.name: Shill Bidding Policy
nodes.desc: Prohibition against sellers or associates bidding on own auctions to inflate prices. Enforced via IP tracking, bidding patterns, linked accounts. Results in suspension.

nodes.name: Ship From Address
nodes.desc: Seller's warehouse or dispatch location used for shipping label generation and delivery time estimates.

nodes.name: Ship to Store
nodes.desc: Discontinued program allowing buyers to have eBay purchases shipped to retail partner locations for pickup.

nodes.name: Shipment Confirmation
nodes.desc: Email and app notification sent to buyer when seller marks item as shipped with tracking information.

nodes.name: Shipping Calculator
nodes.desc: Checkout tool calculating shipping cost based on buyer ZIP/postal code, package dimensions, carrier service level. Shows estimated delivery date before purchase.

nodes.name: Shipping Cost
nodes.desc: Total delivery charge displayed at listing and checkout, dynamically calculated based on buyer's location and selected service level.

nodes.name: Shipping Discount
nodes.desc: Reduced shipping rate for additional items purchased from same seller, encouraging multi-item purchases.

nodes.name: Shipping Discounts
nodes.desc: Discounted or free shipping promotions for marketing campaigns.

nodes.name: Shipping Discounts
nodes.desc: Promotional shipping reductions (e.g., free shipping on orders >$25). Localized: DE 'Versandrabatte' (shipping discounts), FR 'Réductions sur les frais de livraison' (reductions on delivery fees), IT 'Sconti sulla spedizione' (discounts on shipping). Improves conversion 20-30%.

nodes.name: Shipping Labels
nodes.desc: Integrated label printing with discounted rates through eBay shipping partners.

nodes.name: Shipping Restrictions
nodes.desc: Warning notification when item cannot be shipped to buyer's location due to seller limitations or export regulations.

nodes.name: Ships To
nodes.desc: Geographic availability field listing countries and regions where seller will deliver item with corresponding shipping costs.

nodes.name: Shop by Category
nodes.desc: Hierarchical category navigation for browsing listings.

nodes.name: Shop by Category
nodes.desc: Category browse tree with market-specific organization and naming. US has 35,000+ leaf categories, DE/FR/IT use condensed 20,000-category trees. Translation adapts to local commerce conventions: DE 'Stöbern in Kategorien' (browse in categories), FR 'Explorer par catégorie' (explore by category), IT 'Tutte le categorie' (all categories).

nodes.name: Shop by Diagram
nodes.desc: Visual parts finder using interactive vehicle diagrams.

nodes.name: Shopping Cart
nodes.desc: Centralized cart holding multiple items for checkout, supporting combined shipping and bulk purchasing.

nodes.name: Shopping Updates
nodes.desc: Buyer notification category including watched item price drops, back-in-stock alerts, saved search matches, and personalized recommendations.

nodes.name: Show Only
nodes.desc: Specialized filters for Free Returns, Free Shipping, Completed Items, Sold Items, Authenticity Guarantee, and eBay Plus eligibility.

nodes.name: Significantly Not as Described
nodes.desc: Buyer claim that received item materially differs from listing description, photos, or stated condition.

nodes.name: Similar Items
nodes.desc: AI-powered recommendation engine showing related products based on current listing viewed, search history, and purchase behavior.

nodes.name: Similar Sponsored Items
nodes.desc: Algorithmic recommendations module on product pages showing paid ads for related items from other sellers, driving cross-listing discovery and ad revenue.

nodes.name: Simple Delivery
nodes.desc: UK-specific simplified shipping option mandatory for consumer-to-consumer sales.

nodes.name: Simple Delivery
nodes.desc: UK-specific simplified shipping label program. Royal Mail partnership providing discounted postage labels printed from Seller Hub. No separate trips to Post Office required. Includes tracking and Proof of Delivery. Replaced older 'Royal Mail Click & Drop' integration.

nodes.name: Site Preferences
nodes.desc: Desktop-focused settings page controlling search defaults, currency display, language, distance units, and My eBay customization.

nodes.name: SMS Alerts
nodes.desc: Text message notifications for critical events like outbid alerts, winning confirmations, and shipment updates.

nodes.name: SMS Notifications
nodes.desc: Alternative naming for SMS Alerts covering text-based notifications for account security (2FA codes), order tracking, and buyer/seller messaging.

nodes.name: Sneaker Authentication
nodes.desc: Third-party inspection service for sneakers $100+ verifying authenticity via Hypebeast-trained authenticators before shipment to buyer. 1-2 day delay, free service.

nodes.name: Sold Items Filter
nodes.desc: Advanced search option to view completed/sold listings from last 90 days for market research, price comparison, and collectible valuation.

nodes.name: Sold Listings
nodes.desc: Seller Hub view showing all successfully sold items requiring shipment or order processing.

nodes.name: Sold Quantity Display
nodes.desc: Social proof counter on listings showing units sold (e.g., '500+ sold'). Drives urgency and trust. Visible on multi-quantity listings after 5+ sales.

nodes.name: Sort By
nodes.desc: Results reordering dropdown offering Best Match, Price + Shipping (Low/High), Time (Ending Soonest/Newly Listed), Distance, Condition sorting.

nodes.name: Sports Memorabilia
nodes.desc: Category for autographed jerseys, game-used equipment, trading cards, championship rings with COA requirement for high-value items.

nodes.name: Spotlight Deals
nodes.desc: Premium placement for top deals with enhanced visibility.

nodes.name: Spring Clearance
nodes.desc: Annual March-April event for sellers to liquidate winter inventory with sitewide coupons, free listings, promoted listing discounts.

nodes.name: Stamps
nodes.desc: Philately category for postage stamps, first day covers, postal history with condition grading (mint, used, hinged) and catalog value references (Scott, Stanley Gibbons).

nodes.name: Starting Bid
nodes.desc: Minimum opening bid amount for auction listings, determining the lowest acceptable starting price.

nodes.name: Stock Quantity
nodes.desc: Total inventory count for a SKU across all listings and sales channels.

nodes.name: Store Categories
nodes.desc: Custom navigation structure within eBay Stores allowing sellers to organize inventory into seller-defined categories.

nodes.name: Store Email Campaigns
nodes.desc: Email marketing campaigns for store subscribers and past customers.

nodes.name: Store Header
nodes.desc: Customizable banner and branding area at the top of eBay Stores, allowing sellers to showcase their brand identity.

nodes.name: Store Newsletters
nodes.desc: Email marketing tool for store subscribers with promotional messaging.

nodes.name: Store Newsletters
nodes.desc: Email marketing tool for Store subscribers to promote listings to past buyers. Available in most markets with localized templates and compliance (GDPR in EU, CAN-SPAM in US). UK branding: 'Shop newsletter' (shop vs store terminology). Includes A/B testing and open rate analytics.

nodes.name: Store Promotions Box
nodes.desc: Featured area in eBay Stores highlighting current sales, promotions, and special offers to store visitors.

nodes.name: Store Tier - Anchor
nodes.desc: Top-tier store subscription for high-volume sellers with maximum benefits.

nodes.name: Store Tier - Basic
nodes.desc: Mid-tier store subscription with enhanced listing allowances and marketing tools.

nodes.name: Store Tier - Enterprise
nodes.desc: Ultra-premium store tier for enterprise sellers with dedicated support.

nodes.name: Store Tier - Enterprise
nodes.desc: US-only ultra-premium store tier ($2,999.95/mo). 200,000 free listings, dedicated account team, custom integrations, and enterprise API access. For high-volume sellers (>$1M annual GMV). Not available in international markets.

nodes.name: Store Tier - Featured
nodes.desc: Australia-specific store tier replacing Premium in AU market rebranding.

nodes.name: Store Tier - Platin
nodes.desc: Germany-exclusive premium store tier.

nodes.name: Store Tier - Platin
nodes.desc: Germany-exclusive premium store tier (€499.99/mo). Above Top-Shop, below Enterprise-equivalent. Tailored for German Mittelstand (mid-sized businesses). Includes VAT consulting and German logistics partnerships.

nodes.name: Store Tier - Premium
nodes.desc: High-tier store subscription with significant fee reductions and advanced features.

nodes.name: Store Tier - Premium Plus
nodes.desc: Italy-exclusive premium store tier (Negozio Premium Plus).

nodes.name: Store Tier - Premium Plus
nodes.desc: Italy-exclusive top store tier. Equivalent to US Anchor or DE Top-Shop but branded separately to fit Italian market positioning. Includes Italian-language dedicated support and partnerships with Italian carriers (Poste Italiane, BRT).

nodes.name: Store Tier - Starter
nodes.desc: Entry-level store subscription tier with basic benefits and reduced insertion fees.

nodes.name: Subtitle
nodes.desc: Additional searchable text line below main listing title.

nodes.name: Supersize Pictures
nodes.desc: Deprecated paid listing upgrade (2005-2019) enabling high-resolution photo zoom before becoming standard free feature.

nodes.name: Tax Documents
nodes.desc: Section in Seller Hub providing access to 1099-K forms, sales tax summaries, and other tax-related documents.

nodes.name: Template Builder
nodes.desc: Desktop tool enabling creation of reusable listing description templates with placeholder variables, custom HTML, and mobile-responsive design.

nodes.name: Terapeak
nodes.desc: Market research tool providing pricing, competition, and demand analysis for eBay sellers. Acquired by eBay in 2017, integrated into Seller Hub. Renamed to Product Research.

nodes.name: Terms of Service
nodes.desc: Comprehensive terms governing seller and buyer behavior, fee structures, and dispute resolution.

nodes.name: Thermal Printer
nodes.desc: Label printer support for generating 4x6 shipping labels without requiring standard paper or ink.

nodes.name: Third Party Providers
nodes.desc: Certified third-party tools and services marketplace for eBay sellers.

nodes.name: Time Away
nodes.desc: Vacation mode setting to pause or adjust business operations during seller absence.

nodes.name: Time Left
nodes.desc: Real-time countdown display showing remaining time before auction or listing ends.

nodes.name: Top Rated Filter
nodes.desc: Search refinement showing only Top Rated sellers (1% defect rate, 4.8+ ratings, 100+ transactions) for premium buyer protection and faster shipping.

nodes.name: Top Rated Plus
nodes.desc: Badge for individual listings from Top Rated Sellers meeting enhanced shipping and service requirements.

nodes.name: Top Rated Plus
nodes.desc: Item-level badge on listings from Top Rated Sellers meeting enhanced service criteria (1-day handling, 30-day returns, free returns in US). Different implementation across markets: US shows 'Top Rated Plus', UK shows 'eBay Premium Service', DE shows 'Top-Bewertung Plus', AU merged into eBay Plus.

nodes.name: Top Rated Seller
nodes.desc: Elite seller status offering fee discounts and Top Rated Plus badge for excellent performance, customer service, and fast shipping.

nodes.name: Top Rated Seller (Multi-Market)
nodes.desc: Elite seller status with market-specific qualification criteria. US: 100+ transactions, <0.5% defects, same/next-day handling. UK/DE: 30-day returns, 1-day dispatch. Provides Top Rated badge, 10% final value fee discount, search boost. Requirements stricter in US than international markets.

nodes.name: Track Package
nodes.desc: Order details action button linking to carrier's real-time shipment tracking page with scan updates and delivery progress.

nodes.name: Tracking Number
nodes.desc: Carrier-provided identifier for package location tracking, required for seller protection on high-value items.

nodes.name: Trademark
nodes.desc: Intellectual property protection program enforcing trademark rights and preventing counterfeit listings.

nodes.name: Trading Card Authentication
nodes.desc: Professional grading service for trading cards $250+ using PSA/BGS authenticators verifying condition, grade accuracy, case integrity before delivery.

nodes.name: Trading Card Hub
nodes.desc: Dedicated marketplace for trading cards with specialized search, grading integration, and authentication.

nodes.name: Traffic Report
nodes.desc: Analytics showing page views, impressions, and visitor behavior.

nodes.name: Traffic Report
nodes.desc: Listing-level impressions, clicks, and sources breakdown. Shows traffic from search, browse, promoted listings, and external (Google, social). Translation: DE 'Trafficbericht', FR 'Rapport de trafic', IT 'Report traffico'. Updated daily.

nodes.name: Traffic Reports
nodes.desc: Analytics showing views, impressions, and click-through rates for seller listings and store pages.

nodes.name: Transaction Defect Rate
nodes.desc: Percentage of transactions with defects (INR, SNAD, cancellations), must stay below 2% to maintain Above Standard.

nodes.name: Transaction Interference Policy
nodes.desc: Prohibition against contacting buyers to complete sales outside eBay (fee avoidance), offering competing items on active auctions, or sabotaging competitor listings.

nodes.name: Transaction Report
nodes.desc: Transaction-level detail for accounting and reconciliation.

nodes.name: Transaction Report
nodes.desc: Detailed fee and payout reconciliation. Line-item breakdown of all charges (insertion, final value, advertising, shipping). Essential for accounting. Translation: DE 'Transaktionsbericht', FR 'Rapport des transactions', IT 'Report transazioni'.

nodes.name: Try Again
nodes.desc: Retry button on temporary system error pages encouraging resubmission after network interruption or server overload.

nodes.name: Turbo Lister
nodes.desc: Desktop application for bulk listing creation. Fully retired and replaced by web-based tools.

nodes.name: Two-Factor Authentication
nodes.desc: Multi-factor login security requiring password + SMS code, authenticator app, or biometric verification on untrusted devices.

nodes.name: Unique Visitors
nodes.desc: Count of individual users who viewed listing, deduplicated by user account.

nodes.name: Unpaid Item Assistant
nodes.desc: Automated tool for managing unpaid item cases and recovering fees.

nodes.name: Unpaid Item Case
nodes.desc: Formal case process for dealing with buyers who don't pay.

nodes.name: Unread Messages
nodes.desc: My eBay notification counter displaying new seller responses, shipping updates, and transactional messages requiring attention.

nodes.name: Unsold Listings
nodes.desc: Seller Hub view showing ended listings that did not sell, available for relisting.

nodes.name: Upload Tracking
nodes.desc: Tool for manually adding tracking numbers to orders when using non-eBay shipping labels.

nodes.name: User Agreement
nodes.desc: Legal terms and conditions governing eBay platform use, updated periodically to reflect policy changes.

nodes.name: Valid Tracking Rate
nodes.desc: Percentage of shipments with validated carrier tracking, must meet minimum threshold for Top Rated status.

nodes.name: Variation Photos
nodes.desc: Unique images per variation (e.g., each color has dedicated photo). Updates main image when buyer selects variation. Drives 25% higher conversion than generic photos.

nodes.name: Variation Specifics
nodes.desc: Attribute selectors (dropdown/button) on multi-variation listings allowing buyers to choose Size, Color, Style, Capacity before purchase. Required for clothing, shoes, electronics.

nodes.name: VAT Collection
nodes.desc: Value-Added Tax collection for EU/UK transactions. eBay acts as deemed supplier collecting 20-27% VAT on low-value imports (<€150) and remitting to tax authorities.

nodes.name: VAT Services (UK/EU)
nodes.desc: EU Value Added Tax compliance tools for cross-border EU sales. Includes VAT number validation (VIES check), OSS (One Stop Shop) reporting, distance selling threshold tracking, and B2B reverse charge detection. Mandatory for EU sellers above €10k cross-border sales.

nodes.name: Vehicle History Report
nodes.desc: Free AutoCheck vehicle history report on Motors listings showing accidents, title issues, odometer fraud, ownership count. Trust signal for high-value purchases.

nodes.name: Vehicle Purchase Protection
nodes.desc: Specialized buyer protection for vehicle purchases with coverage for undisclosed damage or misrepresentation.

nodes.name: Venmo
nodes.desc: PayPal-owned peer-to-peer payment option available for US buyers at checkout.

nodes.name: Verified Purchase
nodes.desc: Badge indicating reviewer actually purchased the item on eBay.

nodes.name: Verified Purchase
nodes.desc: Badge on product reviews indicating reviewer purchased item on eBay. Prevents fake reviews. Displayed on product pages (not seller feedback). Translation: DE 'Bestätigter Kauf' (confirmed purchase), FR 'Achat vérifié' (verified purchase), IT 'Acquisto verificato'.

nodes.name: Verify Account
nodes.desc: Identity confirmation process requiring phone number, address, payment method verification for new accounts or high-risk activity. Reduces fraud, bot accounts.

nodes.name: Verkäufer-Cockpit Pro
nodes.desc: German localization of Seller Hub. Includes VAT calculator, Deutsche Post shipping integration, German product compliance checks (ElektroG, VerpackG), and localized analytics. UI optimized for German business practices and terminology.

nodes.name: VeRO Program
nodes.desc: Verified Rights Owner program allowing trademark and copyright holders to report intellectual property infringement.

nodes.name: Very Good - Refurbished
nodes.desc: Mid-tier refurbished condition with light wear, full functionality, and standard warranty.

nodes.name: Video Games
nodes.desc: Gaming vertical for consoles, physical games, accessories, retro systems with platform compatibility filters (PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo, PC).

nodes.name: View Count
nodes.desc: Total page views on listing, visible to seller only. Used for diagnosing traffic quality, pricing issues, or search visibility problems.

nodes.name: View Item
nodes.desc: Preview action opening seller's listing in buyer view to verify photos, description, pricing, and shipping details display correctly.

nodes.name: View Item Page
nodes.desc: Core product detail page (VIP) displaying title, photos, description, price, seller info, shipping, returns, authenticity badges, and purchase CTA. 15B+ views annually.

nodes.name: View Order
nodes.desc: Order tracking and management interface showing purchase history, shipping status, and delivery information.

nodes.name: Views
nodes.desc: Simplified metric name for Page Views appearing in mobile app seller analytics and Store Traffic Reports dashboard.

nodes.name: VIN Lookup
nodes.desc: Vehicle Identification Number decoder showing exact year, make, model, trim, engine specs for precise parts compatibility matching.

nodes.name: Virtual Assistant
nodes.desc: AI-powered chatbot answering common questions (tracking, returns, account access) with 70% automation rate. Escalates complex cases to human agents.

nodes.name: Visitor Count
nodes.desc: Seller metric showing total number of unique visitors viewing listing across desktop, mobile web, and mobile app with traffic source breakdown.

nodes.name: Visits
nodes.desc: Number of distinct browsing sessions viewing a listing, counting multiple page views in one session as one visit.

nodes.name: Visual Editor
nodes.desc: WYSIWYG description builder available on desktop and mobile web enabling drag-drop layout, rich text formatting, and image insertion without coding.

nodes.name: Volume Pricing
nodes.desc: Tiered pricing offering discounts for purchasing multiple quantities.

nodes.name: Volume Pricing
nodes.desc: Quantity-based discounts (e.g., buy 3+ save 15%). UK uses 'Multi-Buy' branding (established retail terminology), DE 'Multi-Rabatt' (multi-discount), FR 'Achat multiple' (multiple purchase). Encourages bulk buying.

nodes.name: WATA Grading
nodes.desc: Video game grading integration for sealed games showing WATA/VGA grade (1-10), seal integrity, packaging condition for investment-grade collectibles.

nodes.name: Watch Authentication
nodes.desc: Horologist inspection for luxury watches $2,000+ (Rolex, Omega, Patek Philippe) verifying movement, case, dial, documentation authenticity.

nodes.name: Watch Count
nodes.desc: Metric showing how many buyers have added a listing to their Watchlist, indicating buyer interest level.

nodes.name: Watch List
nodes.desc: Personalized buyer list for tracking items of interest, receiving end-of-auction alerts and price drop notifications.

nodes.name: Watch This Item
nodes.desc: Watchlist add button enabling buyers to track listings of interest with automated alerts for price changes, bidding activity, and listing endings.

nodes.name: Watchers
nodes.desc: Count of unique buyers monitoring listing via watchlist feature, providing social proof metric visible to sellers and potential buyers.

nodes.name: Watchers Count
nodes.desc: Demand signal showing number of buyers watching item (e.g., '37 watchers'). Creates urgency for auctions, validates pricing for BIN. Only visible to seller above 50 watchers.

nodes.name: Watching
nodes.desc: Active watchlist status indicator showing buyer has enabled notifications for this listing, displayed as filled star or heart icon.

nodes.name: Watchlist
nodes.desc: Save and track items of interest with notifications for price changes and ending auctions.

nodes.name: Watchlist
nodes.desc: Saved items feature with market-specific translations and behaviors. Core functionality global but regional differences in notification preferences and auction ending alerts. German 'Beobachtungsliste' emphasizes observation, French 'Objets suivis' (followed items), Italian 'Oggetti che osservi' (items you watch).

nodes.name: Weekly Deals
nodes.desc: Week-long promotional events with curated discounts.

nodes.name: Weekly Payout
nodes.desc: Alternate payout schedule depositing funds every 7 days. Available for sellers preferring consolidated accounting or managing cash flow timing.

nodes.name: Winning Bid
nodes.desc: Current highest bid on an active auction that will win if no higher bids are placed before auction end.

nodes.name: Winning Notice
nodes.desc: Auction conclusion notification confirming buyer's winning bid status and initiating checkout workflow for payment submission.

nodes.name: Write Review
nodes.desc: Product-level review form collecting star rating, descriptive text, and photo uploads for item quality assessment separate from seller feedback.

nodes.name: WYSIWYG Editor
nodes.desc: What-You-See-Is-What-You-Get editor alternative naming for Visual Editor emphasizing live preview and no-code listing creation.

nodes.name: Zahlungsabwicklung bei eBay
nodes.desc: German version of Managed Payments with SEPA direct debit support, German bank integration, and Euro-optimized currency handling. Includes German tax documentation (Umsatzsteuer) and compliance with German payment regulations.

nodes.name: About Me
nodes.desc: Free HTML-based seller profile page launched 1998 allowing sellers to personalize their eBay presence, build trust, and share background information with buyers.

nodes.name: Automated Promoted Listings Campaigns
nodes.desc: Rule-based automation for Promoted Listings with automatic ad rate adjustment, launched March 2025 to reduce manual campaign management.

nodes.name: Billpoint
nodes.desc: Payment solution launched as beta Q4 1999, phased out January 2003 after PayPal acquisition. Precursor to eBay's managed payments infrastructure.

nodes.name: Butterfield & Butterfield
nodes.desc: 135-year-old San Francisco art and antiques auction house acquired May 1999 for ~$260M. Sold to Bonhams 2002. Early attempt to enter high-end collectibles.

nodes.name: COMC
nodes.desc: Commercial agreement and investment announced Nov 2023 with trading card company managing 100M+ cards. Partnership (not acquisition) strengthening collectibles ecosystem.

nodes.name: Circular Fashion Innovator of the Year
nodes.desc: Special $300K prize within Circular Fashion Fund for 2025 cohort, recognizing standout sustainability innovation in fashion resale sector.

nodes.name: Critical Path Software
nodes.desc: Talent acquisition completed December 2010 for mobile strategy expertise, supporting eBay's mobile app development during smartphone commerce transition.

nodes.name: Electronic Travel Auction
nodes.desc: First third-party licensing partner (November 1996) using SmartMarket Technology for travel auctions. Early proof of eBay platform licensing model.

nodes.name: Feedback Forum
nodes.desc: Original feedback and rating system launched February 26, 1996 by Pierre Omidyar. Foundation of eBay's trust infrastructure and peer-to-peer reputation economy.

nodes.name: GSI Commerce / eBay Enterprise
nodes.desc: Acquired March 2011, closed June 2011. Rebranded to eBay Enterprise June 2013. E-commerce technology and fulfillment services for enterprise clients. Later divested.

nodes.name: KnownOrigin
nodes.desc: Leading NFT marketplace acquired June 2022. Founded 2018 in Manchester, UK. Operates autonomously within eBay's digital collectibles ecosystem.

nodes.name: Kruse International
nodes.desc: Automobile auctioneer acquired 1999 for $165M stock. Launched automotive category, precursor to eBay Motors. Repurchased by Dean Kruse 2002.

nodes.name: MYMIX Fashion Campaign
nodes.desc: UK-specific Spring/Summer 2012 fashion marketing campaign. Part of eBay's vertical-specific marketing push during fashion category expansion.

nodes.name: Magento
nodes.desc: E-commerce platform. Initial investment March 2010, full acquisition announced June 2011, completed August 2011. Core component of X.commerce platform. Divested 2015.

nodes.name: Magical Bulk Listing Tool
nodes.desc: AI-powered extension of Magical Listing Tool launched 2024 for batch processing and multi-item listing creation, reducing time for high-volume sellers.

nodes.name: Mission Fish Seller Account
nodes.desc: Charity seller account program retired 2015, replaced by Donation Account within eBay Giving Works/eBay for Charity framework. (donation-account not yet in registry.)

nodes.name: PayPal Spinoff
nodes.desc: Corporate separation completed 2015, creating independent publicly-traded PayPal. Major strategic shift enabling eBay's Managed Payments initiative.

nodes.name: SafeHarbor
nodes.desc: Early fraud and dispute reporting system launched 1999, contactable via SafeHarbor@eBay.com. Precursor to modern Trust & Safety programs and Resolution Center.

nodes.name: ShopRunner
nodes.desc: Premium shipping service acquired as part of GSI Commerce 2011, mostly divested. eBay had minority ownership 2011-2013 during enterprise commerce push.

nodes.name: SmartMarket Technology
nodes.desc: eBay's auction platform technology licensed to Electronic Travel Auction (November 1996). First third-party licensing deal. Internal technology brand.

nodes.name: TCGplayer
nodes.desc: Collectible card game marketplace acquired October 2022 for ~$295M. Operates autonomously serving trading card enthusiasts with integrated authentication services.

nodes.name: TCGplayer Authentication Center
nodes.desc: Authentication service operated by TCGplayer for grading and verifying collectible trading cards. Integrated with eBay Authenticity Guarantee ecosystem.

nodes.name: TCGplayer Marketplace
nodes.desc: Trading card marketplace platform within TCGplayer. Primary buying/selling interface for collectible card games community.

nodes.name: Techstars Future of Ecommerce powered by eBay
nodes.desc: Accelerator program launched September 2023 in partnership with Techstars, supporting startups building next-generation e-commerce solutions.

nodes.name: Things.People.Love
nodes.desc: Creative platform and brand strategy launched 2024 with eBay Evo design system. Unified messaging framework highlighting eBay's unique product assortment.

nodes.name: Tise
nodes.desc: Norway-based C2C social marketplace for Gen Z/Millennial secondhand fashion acquired October 2025. eBay Ventures invested 2022 before full acquisition.

nodes.name: Twice
nodes.desc: Clothing resale startup acquired July 2015 as bolt-on acquisition for eBay Valet fashion category expansion. Integrated into Valet service.

nodes.name: Up4Sale
nodes.desc: Trading site acquired 1998 during early eBay expansion phase. One of earliest acquisition-driven category expansions.

nodes.name: X.commerce
nodes.desc: Unified eBay/PayPal/Magento developer ecosystem announced October 2011 at Innovate conference. Active 2011-2013 era during open commerce platform push.

nodes.name: YOU CAN'T FAKE FASHION Campaign
nodes.desc: Major fashion authenticity initiative launched 2011 with CFDA partnership featuring 75+ American designers. Part of fashion vertical trust-building strategy.

nodes.name: Zong
nodes.desc: Mobile payments via carrier billing, part of X.commerce platform 2011. Early mobile commerce payment experimentation during smartphone transition.

nodes.name: eBay 4.0
nodes.desc: Major mobile app version from mobile-first transformation era. Significant milestone in eBay's app evolution and smartphone commerce strategy.

nodes.name: eBay Fashion App
nodes.desc: Vertical-specific mobile app for fashion category retired 2015. Functionality migrated to flagship eBay app as part of app consolidation strategy.

nodes.name: eBay Innovate Developer Conference
nodes.desc: Annual developer conference held 2011 (minimum). Announced X.commerce platform. Predecessor/alternative to eBay Open conference series.

nodes.name: eBay Milo
nodes.desc: Local shopping engine acquired December 2010 for online-to-offline commerce strategy. Integrated into RedLaser. Served $917B local retail market opportunity.

nodes.name: eBay Mobile App (Android)
nodes.desc: Android mobile app launched February 16, 2010. Early mover in mobile commerce alongside iOS app during smartphone adoption wave.

nodes.name: eBay Moda
nodes.desc: Regional fashion app launched September 2013 for Latin America market. Localized shopping experience for fashion vertical in LATAM.

nodes.name: eBay Now
nodes.desc: Same-day delivery service launched 2012, retired 2015. Pilots in SF, NYC, San Jose. Early experiment in rapid fulfillment competing with Amazon Prime.

nodes.name: eBay Playbook
nodes.desc: Comprehensive brand guide with 280+ pages and 2700+ images/videos. Part of eBay Evo initiative establishing unified design system and brand standards.

nodes.name: eBay RedLaser
nodes.desc: Barcode scanning iPhone app acquired June 2010 with 2M+ downloads. Reached 9M downloads by March 2011. Core mobile shopping tool 2010-2015 era.

nodes.name: eBay Valet
nodes.desc: Consignment service launched June 2014 where eBay handles selling for users. Closed 2018. Included Twice acquisition for fashion expansion.

nodes.name: Expert Verification
nodes.desc: Watch-specific authentication branding used under eBay's luxury verification program. Applied primarily to LUX Watches on eBay. Rebranded to Authenticity Guarantee in Q4 2023 (Nov–Dec) to unify under the AG umbrella. Documented in ERPROL Confluence space with dedicated rebrand artifacts.

nodes.name: Optional Authenticity Guarantee
nodes.desc: Opt-in paid tier of Authenticity Guarantee that includes professional grading as a value-added service (VAS). Also referred to internally as Optional PSA (Post Sale Authentication) or Optional Post Sale Authentication. Launched Q1 2022. Sellers or buyers elect this upgraded path for grading documentation alongside standard authentication. Confluence: EFE space, QIUD space. Jira: FEECC-627, FEECC-2100.

nodes.name: Trusted Seller
nodes.desc: eBay seller trust designation recognizing verified reliability, policy compliance, and quality service history. Distinct from Top Rated Seller (which is primarily metric-driven on shipping speed and return rate). Trusted Seller focuses on platform trust signals and buyer confidence. 122+ internal Confluence documentation pages across multiple product spaces.

nodes.name: Pay Upon Invoice
nodes.desc: Buy Now Pay Later payment option exclusively available in Germany. Powered by Klarna via Adyen integration, allowing buyers to receive items before paying. Invoice typically settled within 14–30 days. Internal acronym: PUI. Documented in AUSTINPD and TPPT Confluence spaces. DE market only.

nodes.name: Pickup / Drop Off
nodes.desc: Click-and-collect and parcel drop-off shipping network in Australia allowing buyers to collect purchases at convenience locations (newsagents, post offices, parcel lockers) rather than home delivery. Australia-specific logistics program. Internal acronym: PUDO. Listed in eBay's internal Acronyms and Common Abbreviations page (SHOPEXQ space).

nodes.name: eBay Giving Works
nodes.desc: Earlier program name for eBay's charitable giving platform. Predecessor to eBay for Charity (the current brand). The charity seller account model within this program was retired in 2015 and replaced by the Donation Account system. Internal acronym: eGW. Program has run since 2003.

nodes.name: Global Buyer Hub
nodes.desc: Internal program for cross-border buyer experience, later rebranded to Global Buyer Experience (GBX). Focused on international buyer acquisition and localization across eBay markets. Internal acronym: GBH. Listed in eBay internal Acronyms page (SHOPEXQ space).

nodes.name: Global Buyer Experience
nodes.desc: Cross-border buyer experience program (formerly Global Buyer Hub / GBH). Coordinates international buyer acquisition, localization, payment options, shipping, and discovery across all eBay markets. Internal acronym: GBX.

nodes.name: Flash Bids
nodes.desc: Time-limited auction format with compressed bidding windows, typically running alongside Flash Sale events. Drives urgency for limited-availability items. Documented in eBay internal Confluence as a distinct feature alongside Flash Sale.

nodes.name: Agentic Search
nodes.desc: AI-powered query agent reclassifying product discovery on eBay. Named by CEO Iannone in Q4 2025 earnings; rolled out to US mobile December 2025.

nodes.name: AI Shopping Agent
nodes.desc: Companion-integrated buyer experience announced May 2025 via eBay Innovation blog. AI agent that assists buyers throughout the shopping journey.

nodes.name: eBay Explore
nodes.desc: AI-powered personalized discovery feed launched August 2024. Covered in eBay Innovation blog for US and UK markets.

nodes.name: Finances Copilot
nodes.desc: AI financial assistant demoed at eBay Open 2025 within Seller Hub Payments tab. Broader rollout planned for 2026.

nodes.name: Your Cost
nodes.desc: COGS (cost of goods sold) tracking feature in Seller Hub. Launched December 2025 per Seller Center documentation.

nodes.name: Offers Dashboard
nodes.desc: Centralized negotiation tool in Seller Hub consolidating all offer management. Launched June 2025 per Seller Update.

nodes.name: Offers in Messaging
nodes.desc: Buyers and sellers negotiate offers directly within the eBay message thread. Announced at eBay Open 2025.

nodes.name: Buyer Details Feature
nodes.desc: Seller Hub tool to identify returning customers and send targeted coupons. Named in the January 2025 Seller Update.

nodes.name: Automated Positive Feedback
nodes.desc: eBay-generated positive feedback automatically posted when a tracked order delivers on time. Rolled out UK August 2025, US September 2025.

nodes.name: Q&A Feature
nodes.desc: Listing FAQ tool allowing sellers to add frequently asked questions and answers to their listings. Launched Winter 2024; own Seller Center timeline URL.

nodes.name: eBay Seller Capital
nodes.desc: Umbrella brand for all eBay seller financing products. Own page at pages.ebay.com/ebaysellercapital/; $100M+ disbursed. Partners include Liberis (US/UK) and YouLend (DE).

nodes.name: Business Cash Advance
nodes.desc: US seller financing up to $1M via Liberis. Named in official eBay+Liberis press release; distinct from Flexible Cash Advance which is a separate product tier.

nodes.name: Flexible Growth Financing
nodes.desc: UK revolving draw financing via Liberis. Launched April 6, 2026; repayments tied to sales percentage. Distinct from US Business Cash Advance.

nodes.name: eBay Merchant Financing
nodes.desc: Germany-specific seller financing via YouLend. Named in June 2025 Seller Update; distinct from Liberis-powered US and UK products.

nodes.name: Fitment Finder
nodes.desc: Buyer-facing vehicle compatibility lookup tool in the eBay Motors app. Named explicitly in the Motors app store description alongside My Garage.

nodes.name: eBay Consignment
nodes.desc: Consignment service where eBay handles authentication, listing, and selling for high-value items. Launched September 2023 (luxury handbags); expanded 5x through 2024 into apparel, watches, jewelry, footwear, and UK. Successor to legacy eBay Valet.

nodes.name: eBay Ambassador Program
nodes.desc: Self-service creator affiliate program open to all US users. Up to 7.5% commission, custom storefronts, 24-hour cookie. Announced October 2025 Seller Update with own Seller Center article. Distinct from eBay Partner Network which targets publishers.

nodes.name: eBay Additional Protection
nodes.desc: Insurance via Allianz Partners covering refurbished and New: Other items from month 13 onward. Named in June 2025 Seller Update for DE and UK markets.

nodes.name: eBay Certified Open Box
nodes.desc: Certification tier for open-box items with 1-year Allstate warranty. Launched May 2025 at pages.ebay.com/openbox/. Sibling tier to eBay Certified Refurbished.

nodes.name: 48 Hours of Drops
nodes.desc: Recurring live shopping event format launched March 2026 with its own official press release. Features limited drops over a 48-hour window.

nodes.name: Case Breaks
nodes.desc: Named live trading card event format within eBay Live where a box or case is opened on stream and cards are allocated to participants. Referenced in Q3 2024 earnings.

nodes.name: Pre-Loved Fashion Condition Grades
nodes.desc: Three new named condition categories for used clothing introduced in the July 2025 Seller Update. Standardizes condition taxonomy for the pre-loved fashion vertical.

nodes.name: Goldin Marketplace
nodes.desc: Always-on fixed-price and make-offer marketplace on Goldin. Distinct from Goldin's timed auction formats; allows immediate purchase of graded sports collectibles.

nodes.name: Goldin Vault
nodes.desc: Secure authenticated storage for graded collectibles. Distinct from PSA Vault; allows vault-to-vault trading without physical shipping.

nodes.name: Goldin Weekly Auctions
nodes.desc: Recurring lower-threshold auction format on Goldin with $5+ starting bids. Distinct named format from Goldin Elite Auctions which targets high-value items.

nodes.name: Goldin Elite Auctions
nodes.desc: Monthly premium auction format on Goldin for items $5,000+. Distinct from Weekly Auctions; targets high-value graded cards and memorabilia.

nodes.name: Studio Auctions
nodes.desc: Goldin sub-brand for Hollywood props and film/TV memorabilia auctions. Became a Goldin sub-acquisition in June 2025.

nodes.name: TCGplayer Direct
nodes.desc: Seller fulfillment program where sellers ship inventory to TCGplayer's warehouse; TCGplayer handles all buyer-facing fulfillment. Also referenced as Direct by TCGplayer.

nodes.name: TCGplayer Pro
nodes.desc: Professional seller pricing tier on TCGplayer providing enhanced tools, analytics, and lower transaction fees for high-volume card sellers.

nodes.name: TCGplayer Subscription
nodes.desc: Monthly subscriber program at $8.99/month launched January 2024. Provides members with discounts and priority access on TCGplayer.

nodes.name: TCGplayer Market Price
nodes.desc: Named pricing data product calculating card values using real-transaction averages across TCGplayer sales. Industry-standard reference price for trading card valuations.

nodes.name: TCGplayer Infinite
nodes.desc: Content and community hub at infinite.tcgplayer.com covering strategy guides, deck lists, and trading card game news. Separate subdomain from the marketplace.

nodes.name: Store Your Products
nodes.desc: Named inventory storage program for TCGplayer sellers (abbreviated SYP). Distinct from TCGplayer Direct fulfillment; underwent policy changes June 2024.

nodes.name: Growth Acceleration Program
nodes.desc: Named seller growth program on TCGplayer offering resources, support, and incentives to help card sellers scale their businesses.

nodes.name: Depop Payments
nodes.desc: Named payment processing system covering Stripe, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Klarna for US, UK, and AU markets. Defined in Depop Terms of Service.

nodes.name: Depop Shipping
nodes.desc: Named prepaid label service with market-specific carrier integrations: USPS (US), Evri (UK), Sendle (AU). Simplifies shipping for Depop sellers.

nodes.name: Depop Protection
nodes.desc: Official buyer and seller protection program on Depop. Named exactly as Depop Protection in official documentation — not Depop Buyer Protection.

nodes.name: Depop Outfits
nodes.desc: Moodboarding and outfit-building feature on Depop. Formally launched September 24, 2025; covered by Depop newsroom, TechCrunch, and Retail Dive.

nodes.name: Certilogo
nodes.desc: AI apparel authentication and Digital Product Passport infrastructure platform acquired by eBay July 2023. Powers EU Digital Product Passport compliance for fashion items.

nodes.name: 3PM Shield
nodes.desc: AI marketplace compliance and counterfeit detection platform acquired by eBay in 2023. Powers brand protection and VeRO enforcement infrastructure.

nodes.name: eBay Ventures
nodes.desc: Official eBay corporate venture capital arm. Own page at ebayinc.com/ebay-ventures/. Investments include Tise (2022 investment ahead of 2025 acquisition).

nodes.name: Caramel Dealer Services LLC
nodes.desc: Legal operating entity name for Caramel referenced in eBay terms and conditions. Powers the Secure Purchase vehicle transaction service.

nodes.name: Seller Cockpit Pro
nodes.desc: Germany's distinct Seller Hub equivalent — Verkäufer Cockpit Pro. Received its biggest refresh in years in summer 2025 including a dedicated pricing recommendation dashboard.

nodes.name: eBay Pro
nodes.desc: Named replacement for eBay Stores in Australia. Tiered plans including Pro Starter. Distinct product branding from the global eBay Stores offering.

nodes.name: eBaymag
nodes.desc: Free cross-border listing tool with auto-translation. Lists seller inventory on 8 eBay international sites covering all core markets.

nodes.name: eBay for Change
nodes.desc: UK program for registered social enterprises offering zero seller fees and business training. Partnership with Social Enterprise UK.

nodes.name: eDelivery International Shipping API
nodes.desc: Formally named eDIS API on developer.ebay.com. Restricted to Greater China-based sellers for international shipping label generation. Launched Q1 2025; bundle resource added Q3 2025.

nodes.name: Buy Marketing API
nodes.desc: Named replacement for the decommissioned Merchandising API (sunset January 6, 2025). Two new methods added in Q4 2025: getMostWatchedItems and getSimilarItems.

nodes.name: GraphQL Explorer
nodes.desc: Named developer tool for testing the Inventory Mapping API in production environments. Launched Q4 2025 per eBay developer newsletter.

nodes.name: Sign in with eBay
nodes.desc: Named OAuth-based identity integration product with dedicated developer.ebay.com/develop/sign-in-with-ebay page and usage guidelines. Distinct from the OAuth 2.0 protocol itself.

nodes.name: Taxonomy SDK
nodes.desc: Open-source SDK for bulk aspect metadata comparison using the eBay Taxonomy API. Separately named artifact from the Taxonomy API; referenced in Q3 and Q4 2025 developer newsletters.

nodes.name: Post Order API
nodes.desc: Named traditional API for post-sale operations including returns, disputes, and cancellations. Officially distinct from the REST Fulfillment API in the modern developer platform.

nodes.name: Beckett
nodes.desc: Official eBay Authenticity Guarantee authentication partner for trading cards. Listed on eBay AG help pages alongside PSA and SGC.

nodes.name: Certified Collectibles Group
nodes.desc: Official eBay Authenticity Guarantee grading organization (CCG). Covers coins, currency, and comics. Canonical name per AG help pages — prior research used CSG abbreviation in error.

nodes.name: SGC
nodes.desc: Official eBay Authenticity Guarantee trading card grading partner. Listed alongside PSA and Beckett on eBay AG help pages.

nodes.name: Sneaker Con
nodes.desc: Named sneaker authentication partner within the eBay Authenticity Guarantee program. Handles physical inspection of authenticated footwear.

nodes.name: Promoted Listings Automated Campaigns
nodes.desc: Rule-based automation within Promoted Listings General that automatically promotes new listings and adjusts ad rates. Named in eBay Innovation blog with dedicated announcement.

nodes.name: Promoted Listings Priority Video Ads
nodes.desc: Short video ad format within Promoted Listings Priority. CPC model, 45-second max, MP4/MOV format. Announced April 2026 Seller Update; expanding from AU beta to US/UK/CA.

nodes.name: eBay Trading Assistants
nodes.desc: Official program running 2002–2013 allowing certified sellers to sell items on behalf of others for a fee. Retired September 20, 2013 with thousands of active participants at peak.

nodes.name: eBay ShopBot
nodes.desc: Facebook Messenger chatbot for product discovery and shopping. Launched October 2016; discontinued September 2018.

nodes.name: MissionFish
nodes.desc: Original charity donation backend for eBay for Charity from 2003. Became Points of Light then rebranded to PayPal Giving Fund around 2013.

nodes.name: PayPal Giving Fund
nodes.desc: Operational name after MissionFish rebrand; continued to power eBay for Charity donation routing. Still referenced in eBay for Charity documentation.

nodes.name: TCGplayer Buylist
nodes.desc: Named buylist program allowing stores to purchase cards from sellers through TCGplayer. Sunset July 17, 2024.

nodes.name: Tise Cash
nodes.desc: In-app green currency on Tise earned through posting, buying, and following activity. Redeemable for rewards within the Tise Nordic C2C marketplace.

nodes.name: Auction
nodes.desc: Auction-format listings and bidding

nodes.name: Authentication
nodes.desc: Product authentication and verification services

nodes.name: Buyer Programs
nodes.desc: Buyer-facing programs and protections

nodes.name: Charity
nodes.desc: Charitable giving and donations platform

nodes.name: Collectibles
nodes.desc: Trading cards, memorabilia, and collectibles marketplace

nodes.name: Community
nodes.desc: Community forums, education, and seller support

nodes.name: Developer
nodes.desc: Developer platform, APIs, and tools

nodes.name: Discovery
nodes.desc: Search, browse, and discovery features

nodes.name: Fashion
nodes.desc: Fashion and luxury goods marketplace

nodes.name: Impact
nodes.desc: Social impact and sustainability programs

nodes.name: Listing Tools
nodes.desc: Tools for creating and managing listings

nodes.name: Live
nodes.desc: Live shopping and streaming commerce

nodes.name: Motors
nodes.desc: Vehicles, parts, and automotive marketplace

nodes.name: Payments
nodes.desc: Payment processing and checkout platform

nodes.name: Refurbished
nodes.desc: Certified refurbished and open box products

nodes.name: Returns
nodes.desc: Returns, refunds, and buyer protection

nodes.name: Shipping
nodes.desc: Shipping, logistics, and fulfillment services

nodes.name: Stores
nodes.desc: eBay Stores subscription and seller storefronts

nodes.name: Trust & Safety
nodes.desc: Trust, safety, and fraud prevention programs

nodes.name: Vault
nodes.desc: Physical storage and trading platform for authenticated collectibles

nodes.name: Secure Purchase
nodes.desc: Transaction service for vehicle purchases handling paperwork, ownership transfer, financing, and delivery. Up to $100K Vehicle Purchase Protection. Powered by Caramel Dealer Services (eBay subsidiary). $25 buyer fee.

nodes.name: SGS Vehicle Inspections
nodes.desc: Independent third-party 150-point vehicle inspection service. $99.50 fee. Trained inspectors nationwide, reports within 24 hours, includes interior/exterior photography. For cars and motorcycles.

nodes.name: Escrow.com
nodes.desc: Licensed escrow company for vehicle transactions. Acts as neutral third party holding funds until transaction complete. 0.89%-3.25% fee of purchase price. 2-day inspection period. $4B+ in transactions.

nodes.name: eBay Consignment
nodes.desc: Third-party consignment service via Linda's Stuff. Seller submits designer items, partner photographs, researches, prices, lists, and sells. 60-80% commission depending on sale price. Categories: apparel, bags, footwear, jewelry, watches.

nodes.name: Echtheitsprüfung für Bekleidung
nodes.desc: Authentication check for designer clothing, shoes, and accessories. €10 optional fee, €0.01 minimum item value. Covers 100+ luxury brands including everyday items (socks, underwear, swimwear). Germany-only.

nodes.name: eBay Seller Capital
nodes.desc: Seller financing via third-party partners (Liberis US Inc, FC Marketplace LLC). Three products: Business Cash Advance ($500-$1M), Flexible Cash Advance ($1K-$2M), Term Loan (up to $500K). Repayment as % of sales or fixed payments.

nodes.name: Business Cash Advance
nodes.desc: Lump sum financing ($500-$1M) repaid as percentage of daily sales. Provided by Liberis US Inc. One fixed fee, no interest. Minimum $5K revenue in last 12 months required.

nodes.name: Flexible Cash Advance
nodes.desc: On-demand access to approved funds ($1K-$2M) for up to 12 months. Pay only what you use. Provided by Liberis US Inc. Minimum $500/month revenue required.

nodes.name: Seller Capital Term Loan
nodes.desc: Traditional loan with fixed monthly payments. Up to $500K funding. Provided by FC Marketplace LLC (iBusiness Funding subsidiary). 5.99% origination fee + fixed periodic interest. Minimum $50K annual revenue required.

nodes.name: AI-Generated Backgrounds
nodes.desc: AI tool that transforms product photos with generated backdrops for professional, uniform appearance. Background enhancement tool for sellers.

nodes.name: AI Description Generator
nodes.desc: Automatically creates attention-grabbing item descriptions when sellers select "Use AI description". Can be used as-is, edited, or as inspiration.

nodes.name: eBay Foundation
nodes.desc: Philanthropic organization established 1998. Partners with nonprofits advancing inclusive entrepreneurship. $140M+ awarded since 1998. $18M granted in 2024. Includes Matching Gifts (up to $10K per employee), Global Give program ($3M annual grants), and Changemakers volunteer program.

nodes.name: Global Give
nodes.desc: Annual employee-powered grant program awarding $3M to 30 nonprofits advancing inclusive entrepreneurship in untapped communities. Shifted from employee voting to trust-based philanthropy decision-making. Includes Rapid Response variant for crisis situations.

nodes.name: eBay Impact Report
nodes.desc: Annual sustainability and social impact report. Published since 2022. Covers economic opportunities created, carbon emissions avoided, waste prevented, charitable giving, pay parity, renewable energy progress, and net-zero 2045 goals. 2024 report: $5B economic impact, 1.6M metric tons CO2 avoided, 70K metric tons waste prevented, $192M charity raised.

nodes.name: Recommerce Report
nodes.desc: Annual report on secondhand shopping trends and sustainability impact. Published since 2020. Launched annually on Recommerce Day (May 21). 2025 report: 89% consumers maintaining/increasing secondhand spending, 81% motivated by savings, 45% by sustainability, 68% feel good about giving items second life. Tracks waste avoided, carbon emissions prevented, consumer motivations.

nodes.name: Small Business Report
nodes.desc: Annual report on eBay seller success and economic impact. Published since 2022. Surveys 4,300+ sellers across US, UK, DE, CA, JP, AU. Key findings: 94% see strong eBay connection to success, 71% rely heavily on eBay, 61% are accidental entrepreneurs, 43% in rural/small towns, 68% expect 5-year growth. Documents Main Street economic impact.

nodes.name: Free 4-Day Shipping Badge
nodes.desc: Visual badge displayed on listings offering free 4-day delivery. Trust signal for buyers. Related to Free 4-Day Shipping service.

nodes.name: Product Research
nodes.desc: Provides 3 years of eBay sales data for millions of items. Includes sales trends, average sold prices, shipping costs, sell-through rates, and seller competition data. Made free to all Seller Hub sellers in April 2021. Formerly Terapeak Product Research, rebranded May 2024.

nodes.name: Sourcing Insights
nodes.desc: Real-world sales data for developing sourcing strategy and identifying market opportunities. Shows sold single stock listings, in-stock vs out-of-stock items, high-demand categories with low inventory. Available to Basic Store+ sellers.

nodes.name: Listing Quality Report
nodes.desc: Downloadable Excel analysis of top 10 categories with most live listings. Provides optimization recommendations to boost views, impressions, and sales. Includes competitor benchmarking and Google Shopping rejection insights. US and UK markets.

nodes.name: Traffic Report
nodes.desc: Shows how buyers find and interact with listings. Tracks impressions, page views, click-through rate, watchers, traffic sources (organic search, promoted, direct, off-eBay). Up to 2 years of historical data for active listings.

nodes.name: Store Traffic Report
nodes.desc: Tracks total visits to eBay Stores or paid visits from Promoted Display ads. Store-level traffic analysis separate from individual listing traffic. Available to Store subscribers.

nodes.name: Seller Performance Standards
nodes.desc: Dashboard showing performance on key metrics: transaction defect rate, late shipment rate, cases closed without seller resolution. Monitors compliance with eBay standards and identifies improvement areas.

nodes.name: Service Metrics Dashboard
nodes.desc: Shows "Item not received" and "Item not as described" rates vs peer benchmarks. Monthly evaluation (20th of month) with ratings: Low, Average, High, or Very High compared to similar sellers.

nodes.name: Advertising Dashboard
nodes.desc: Centralized dashboard for managing all advertising campaigns. AI-powered insights, recommendations, and performance metrics. Tracks impressions, clicks, ROAS, cost-per-click. Major redesign July 2024.

nodes.name: Bulk Campaign Management
nodes.desc: Spreadsheet-based tool for creating and updating multiple priority campaigns at once from Advertising dashboard. Bulk editing for ad campaigns.

nodes.name: Discounts Manager
nodes.desc: Suite of promotional tools for eBay Store subscribers. Includes sale events, volume pricing, coded coupons, shipping discounts, and order discounts. Formerly Promotions Manager.

nodes.name: Volume Pricing
nodes.desc: Tiered discounts for buyers purchasing multiple quantities of single item. Can stack with markdown sales. Configurable discount tiers.

nodes.name: Coded Coupons
nodes.desc: Create and share discount codes publicly on eBay or privately off eBay. Coupon codes visible on search results, listings, and checkout. Available to eBay Store subscribers.

nodes.name: Sale Events
nodes.desc: Group items and offer time-bound discounts. Three types: Percentage Off, Amount Off, or Sale Event Only (markdown). Sale prices appear in search results.

nodes.name: Shipping Discounts
nodes.desc: Time-bound free shipping or conditional free shipping offers to buyers. Available to eBay Store subscribers.

nodes.name: Order Discounts
nodes.desc: Discounts based on order size or amount spent by buyer. Minimum purchase thresholds. Available to eBay Store subscribers.

nodes.name: AI Assistant for Messaging
nodes.desc: AI-powered assistant that recommends replies to buyer messages. Launched August 2025. Available in Seller Hub messaging. US and UK markets.

nodes.name: Offers in Messaging
nodes.desc: Allows sellers to send offers directly within message threads. Launched August 2025. US market. Streamlines negotiation process.

nodes.name: Track Your Costs
nodes.desc: Tool for tracking acquisition costs to calculate profit margins. Launched Fall 2025. US market. Helps sellers understand profitability per item.

nodes.name: Inventory Mapping API
nodes.desc: AI-powered API turning existing product data into high-quality eBay listings with automated recommendations. Launched Late August 2025. US market.

nodes.name: Automated Feedback
nodes.desc: Automatically leaves positive feedback for buyers after successful transaction. Launched September 2025. US market. Opt-in feature.

nodes.name: Promoted Offsite
nodes.desc: Promotes eligible inventory on external channels like Google with AI-powered optimization. Cost-per-click model. Major promotional credits in 2024-2025.

nodes.name: Promoted Stores
nodes.desc: Cost-per-click ads driving traffic to eBay Store. Features store name, logo, category or coupon. Two campaign types: Category and Coupon. Monthly budget pacing introduced October 2025.

nodes.name: Promoted Listings Express
nodes.desc: Flat fee upfront payment for sponsored placements on similar listing pages. Designed for auction listings. DISCONTINUED April 15, 2024.

nodes.name: Saved Searches
nodes.desc: Create saved searches for regularly searched items with email alerts for new matching listings. Searches appear in feed when signed in.

nodes.name: Watch List
nodes.desc: Track up to 1,000 items with sorting, multi-select delete, and notifications for price changes and listing endings. Includes category filters added March 2025.

nodes.name: Watch List Category Filters
nodes.desc: Filter Watch List by specific category to organize watched items. Available on desktop and iOS. Launched March 2025.

nodes.name: Saved Sellers
nodes.desc: Follow favorite sellers to see new listings, collections, and updates on homepage feed. Access via My eBay > Saved Sellers. Formerly "favorite sellers".

nodes.name: My Collection
nodes.desc: Organize, track, and manage collectible card games and trading cards. Supports up to 5,000 items with image scanning, condition tracking, PSA integration, and market data. Desktop, iOS, Android.

nodes.name: Personalized Feed
nodes.desc: Customizable homepage with personalized product streams based on interests, brands, searches, and purchase history. Users select interests to transform homepage. Major updates 2018-2019.

nodes.name: Product Recommendations
nodes.desc: AI-powered personalized recommendations using deep learning and two-tower architecture. Real-time user embeddings for homepage, feed, and recommendation modules based on browsing history.

nodes.name: Shop the Look
nodes.desc: AI-powered immersive carousel of fashion outfits tailored to shopping history with interactive hotspots. Personalized style recommendations for users viewing 10+ fashion items in 180 days. April 2024 launch.

nodes.name: AI Shopping Agent
nodes.desc: Agentic AI conversational assistant delivering real-time, hyper-personalized product recommendations and expert guidance. Inline predictive messaging. Limited rollout May 2025.

nodes.name: Price Drop Notifications
nodes.desc: Automatic notifications to watchers when sellers lower prices (5% for items under $200, 3% for $200-$1,000, 2% for over $1,000). Part of push notifications.

nodes.name: Image Search
nodes.desc: Visual search using photos to find items. Computer vision and CNNs match uploaded images against live listings. Launched 2017, temporarily disabled end of 2024/2025.

nodes.name: Find It On eBay
nodes.desc: Share-to-search feature allowing users to share images from social networks (Facebook, Pinterest) or websites directly to eBay app to find similar listings.

nodes.name: Barcode Scanner
nodes.desc: In-app barcode scanning when listing items. Access from "list an item" screen or after searching. Helps sellers quickly list products by scanning UPC/EAN codes.

nodes.name: AR Box Sizing
nodes.desc: Augmented reality feature ("Which Box?") using camera and Google ARCore to help sellers determine if USPS shipping boxes fit items. Overlays virtual 3D boxes on items. Android only.

nodes.name: Push Notifications
nodes.desc: Real-time mobile notifications for orders, offers, auctions, deals, coupons, delivery updates, price changes, and new listings. Configurable by type in app settings.

nodes.name: API Sandbox
nodes.desc: Complete testing environment mirroring Production. Test users and test money ($500K weekly refresh). Allows prototyping and testing business logic before going live.

nodes.name: API Explorer
nodes.desc: Interactive developer console for running sample API calls in Sandbox and Production. Test requests for most eBay API methods while signed in. Developer account required.

nodes.name: Notification API
nodes.desc: Developer API enabling push notifications to application endpoints. Subscription management, destination configuration, HTTP push with X-EBAY-SIGNATURE security headers.

nodes.name: Buy Marketing API
nodes.desc: API with getAlsoViewedByProduct and getAlsoBoughtByProduct methods. Enables shopping experiences for browsing by product with recommendation features.

nodes.name: Catalog API
nodes.desc: Search and locate eBay catalog products matching items to sell. Ensures listings have complete and accurate product information from eBay catalog.

nodes.name: Klarna Pay in 4
nodes.desc: Buy now pay later service splitting purchases into four interest-free payments, paid every 2 weeks. Soft credit check only. Available at checkout on eligible purchases.

nodes.name: Klarna Financing
nodes.desc: Extended financing option with repayment terms 3-24 months and interest rates 7.99%-35.99%. Separate from Pay in 4. Loan approval based on credit check.

nodes.name: Sezzle Pay in 4
nodes.desc: Third-party BNPL splitting purchases into four interest-free installments over 6 weeks. Instant approval, no hard credit check. Via Sezzle app and virtual card.

nodes.name: Afterpay
nodes.desc: BNPL service for four equal installments over 6 weeks. Only available when checking out with single seller. Available in Afterpay mobile app.

nodes.name: Venmo
nodes.desc: Digital wallet payment option integrated at eBay checkout. Part of push to expand payment methods for digital natives. Available for most categories.

nodes.name: PayPal Credit 6 Month Financing
nodes.desc: Everyday promotional financing on purchases $149+. No interest if paid in full within 6 months. Previously offered 12-month and 24-month terms for higher amounts.

nodes.name: eBay Mastercard
nodes.desc: Co-branded credit card issued by Synchrony Bank offering 1-3 reward points per $1 spent. Program ending March 24, 2026. Points convert to eBay gift cards. Cardholders transitioning to Synchrony Premier World Mastercard.

nodes.name: Automatic Tax Calculation
nodes.desc: eBay automatically calculates, collects, and remits sales tax for transactions in 46 US jurisdictions. No action or fees required from sellers. Tax calculated based on buyer shipping address, deducted from payouts.

nodes.name: Currency Conversion Service
nodes.desc: Automatic currency conversion when buyer pays in different currency than seller payout currency. Transaction exchange rate with 3-3.3% conversion charge automatically deducted from sales.

nodes.name: Multi-Currency Payout
nodes.desc: Partnership with Payoneer enabling sellers to receive payouts in multiple currencies (USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, etc.) with faster fund access. Allows listing on multiple international eBay sites with flexible currency management.

nodes.name: Immediate Payment Requirement
nodes.desc: Seller tool requiring instant payment for Buy It Now and auction listings with BIN option. Prevents unpaid items. Available to sellers in good standing for items under $10,000 USD.

nodes.name: VAT Invoice Automation
nodes.desc: eBay automatically generates VAT invoices for UK/EU sellers and provides buyers with VAT receipts. Downloadable through Seller Hub or My eBay for up to 18 months. Opt-in trial program.

nodes.name: Selling Manager Pro
nodes.desc: Subscription service ($15.99/month, free with Premium/Anchor stores) offering bulk invoicing, automated email, inventory tracking, automated feedback, P&L reports. Many features made free in 2022 transition to Seller Hub. Being phased out.

nodes.name: Seller Verification Program
nodes.desc: Identity verification proving seller legitimacy and business credentials. Displays verification badge on seller profiles. Requires identity documents for individuals, business registration/tax ID/licenses/bank account for businesses.

nodes.name: Two-Step Verification
nodes.desc: Security feature requiring username/password plus verification code sent to phone or email. Codes via eBay app push, SMS, or authenticator app one-time passcode.

nodes.name: Passkeys
nodes.desc: Advanced authentication using biometric authentication (fingerprint, facial recognition) or device PIN instead of passwords. Saved in iCloud Keychain (iPhone), Google Password Manager (Android), or Windows Hello.

nodes.name: Community Mentor Program
nodes.desc: Volunteer program where experienced sellers/buyers help users through "Ask A Mentor" board. Benefits: private Mentors Lounge access, exclusive badge, direct access to Community team, video chats with peers.

nodes.name: Small Business Advocacy Network
nodes.desc: 100+ member network across 26 countries advocating for sound ecommerce policy. Members visit legislators, receive early policy information, get business promotion through eBay channels. Managed by Government Relations team.

nodes.name: Expressions Panel
nodes.desc: Seller feedback program inviting sellers to participate in Zoom sessions and research panels to shape eBay future. Separate from eBay Council program.

nodes.name: eBay Council
nodes.desc: Research panel program inviting sellers to participate in surveys and research. Social commenting features discontinued December 31, 2024, but panel invitations continue.

nodes.name: Developer Loyalty Program
nodes.desc: Tiered program offering expanded benefits including marketing opportunities, early access to product innovations, consulting engagements, and beta testing opportunities based on developer tier qualification.

nodes.name: Payment Dispute Seller Protections
nodes.desc: Protection for chargebacks and payment disputes. eBay covers dispute amount, waives $20-$100 dispute fee, removes negative feedback, and helps build evidence. May automatically apply protections without seller action.

nodes.name: Case Appeals Process
nodes.desc: Formal appeals process allowing buyers and sellers to appeal case decisions within 30 days of closure by providing new information. eBay reviews and responds within 48 hours.

nodes.name: Managed Returns
nodes.desc: Opt-in automation giving buyers consistent return initiation and sellers efficient return management. Creates automatic return shipping labels and processes returns through seller-configured automation rules.

nodes.name: eBay Security Center
nodes.desc: Centralized hub for account protection information, privacy guidance, device security tips, wireless network protection, scam recognition, phishing detection, and fake webpage identification. Includes account takeover detection and phishing reporting.

nodes.name: eBay Shipping Partner Platform
nodes.desc: Integration platform allowing sellers to access negotiated carrier rates through ShipRush, with automatic tracking upload and USPS Commercial Plus pricing (up to 25% savings). No subscription fee for eligible users.

nodes.name: eBay Guaranteed Delivery
nodes.desc: Buyers search for items guaranteed to arrive within 1-4 business days. If items arrive late, buyers receive vouchers or shipping refunds, and sellers protected from late delivery feedback.

nodes.name: eBay International Standard Delivery
nodes.desc: International shipping service with $100 shipping protection plan, automated customs declarations, and seller authorization for eBay to arrange carrier services for export and customs clearance.

nodes.name: In-Store Pickup
nodes.desc: Buyers pick up items from local stores. US has "In-Store Pickup," UK/AU/DE offer "Click and Collect" at 650+ Argos locations (UK) and ParcelPoint/Hubbed (AU).

nodes.name: QR Code Shipping Labels
nodes.desc: Sellers without printers generate QR codes for USPS, FedEx, UPS labels, then have them scanned and printed at drop-off locations via mobile device.

nodes.name: eBay Plus
nodes.desc: Paid membership (AU$49/year or AU$4.99/month) offering free express delivery to metro addresses and free standard delivery elsewhere on 15+ million items. Available in Australia and Germany only.

nodes.name: eBay Managed Delivery
nodes.desc: End-to-end fulfillment service where eBay arranges storage, packing, and shipping through expert logistics partners in strategically located warehouses. Buyers receive items in 3 days or less in eBay-branded boxes.

nodes.name: Automated Prepaid Return Labels
nodes.desc: Opt-in automation allowing eBay to automatically accept returns and generate prepaid return labels using eBay-negotiated rates (typically cheaper than carrier rates). Includes customizable automation rules.

nodes.name: eBay/USPS Co-Branded Shipping Supplies
nodes.desc: Free USPS Priority Mail boxes co-branded with eBay logo, available to sellers with free shipping (minimum 25 quantity per item). Order via 1-800-222-1811.

nodes.name: eBay Branded Packaging Store
nodes.desc: Official eBay online store selling eBay-branded boxes, envelopes, tape, bubble mailers, and poly bags through partnership with Swiftpak. Competitively priced with convenient delivery.

nodes.name: ShipCover Insurance
nodes.desc: Shipping insurance for USPS shipments up to $15,000, cheaper than carrier insurance with built-in claim process. Covers most international countries.

nodes.name: Bulk Label Printing Tool
nodes.desc: Seller Hub feature allowing batch purchase and printing of shipping labels for multiple orders (recommended 10-20 at a time), with order combination detection for same buyers.

nodes.name: Customs Declaration Automation
nodes.desc: Automated pre-filled USPS customs forms (PS Form 2976, 2976-A) combined with shipping labels for international shipments through eBay Labels.

nodes.name: Time Away
nodes.desc: Allows sellers to pause sales (hide listings) or continue sales with automatic handling time adjustments and buyer notifications. Includes automatic messaging for buyer inquiries. Vacation mode.

nodes.name: eBay Freight Shipping
nodes.desc: Shipping service for oversized items over 150 lbs or exceeding 130 inches combined dimensions. Primarily LTL (Less Than Load) shipments with two official freight partners listed.

nodes.name: eBay Now
nodes.desc: Same-day delivery program launched 2012-2013 offering $5 flat fee delivery in NYC, Chicago, Dallas, and San Francisco Bay Area. Discontinued in 2015.

nodes.name: eBay Breaks
nodes.desc: Live events where hosts open trading card packs/boxes on livestream. Participants purchase spots representing teams, players, or divisions. Available only through pre-approved, vetted sellers.

nodes.name: eBay Endless Runway
nodes.desc: Fashion initiative featuring pre-loved fashion on runways around the world, promoting sustainable luxury fashion. Part of eBay fashion sustainability efforts.

nodes.name: Circular Fashion Fund
nodes.desc: Supports innovative businesses extending life of fashion through resale, repair and circular design. Eight finalists receive $50K grants plus mentoring; one Global Winner receives $300K investment from eBay Ventures.

nodes.name: eBay Trade In
nodes.desc: Partnership with Fonehouse allowing customers to trade in electronics (phones, tablets, smartwatches, consoles, laptops) across 8 categories for instant eBay coupons or bank payment. Includes ADISA-accredited data erasure and insurance up to £150.

nodes.name: eBay Wine
nodes.desc: Partnership with WineDirect bringing 1,400+ wineries to eBay Wine marketplace with 10,000+ selections. Pre-approved sellers only due to regulatory requirements. Features collectible, rare and everyday wines.

nodes.name: eBay Real Estate
nodes.desc: Non-binding advertising platform for real estate with three formats: auction, fixed price, and traditional listings (30-90 day advertising). Includes Item Specifics (bedrooms, square footage). Licensed professionals can list for third parties.

nodes.name: eBay Domain Marketplace
nodes.desc: Marketplace for buying/selling domain names via Best Offer, Auction, and Buy It Now formats. Features premium and standard domains. No eBay account required for buyers.

nodes.name: eBay Fitment Plus
nodes.desc: Free service automatically adding/updating vehicle compatibility data to Parts & Accessories listings using brand and part number matching. Works with eBay Guaranteed Fit program.

nodes.name: eBay Guaranteed Fit
nodes.desc: Protection program for Parts & Accessories buyers. eBay verifies vehicle details match seller compatibility; eBay pays return shipping for fitment issues. Covers most automotive parts for cars, trucks, motorcycles.

nodes.name: eBay Business Supply
nodes.desc: B2B umbrella combining Business & Industrial category, SAP Ariba Spot Buy integration, and eBay Wholesale Deals. Includes corporate procurement access to millions of MRO, electrical, technology, office supplies from vetted sellers. Pricing: $21.95-$2,999.95/month.

nodes.name: Bulk Inventory Solution
nodes.desc: Exclusive marketplace connecting vetted wholesalers to eBay sellers. Partnership with BULQ offers excess/returned inventory from top retailers. Includes electronics, clothing, and more for resale.

nodes.name: eBay Authenticate
nodes.desc: New streamlined service (2025) where sellers receive 80% of final sale price for luxury handbags $500+ from 12 high-end brands. Different from standard Authenticity Guarantee - consignment-style model.

nodes.name: PSA Grading Integration
nodes.desc: Integration allowing collectors to send cards directly to PSA for grading through eBay Authenticity Guarantee without separate PSA account. Pricing matches PSA tiers ($39.99-$10,000 per card). Streamlines shipping process.

nodes.name: Heavy Equipment Verified Condition
nodes.desc: Detailed condition verification reports for Business & Industrial heavy equipment. Purchases up to $200,000 backed by Business Equipment Purchase Protection.
